programme.desc: Después de escapar de un centro psiquiátrico en Estonia, Esther viaja a Estados Unidos haciéndose pasar por la hija desaparecida de una familia adinerada. Sin embargo, surge un giro inesperado que la enfrenta a una madre.

programme.title: Marcial Maciel, el lobo De Dios (2025)
programme.desc: Los informes de abuso sexual infantil y la muerte de Juan Pablo II son el preámbulo de la caída del imperio de Maciel.

programme.title: Tsuki to Laika to Nosferatu (2021)
programme.desc: En 1838, el agente inmobiliario alemán Thomas Hutter acude a Transilvania para cerrar la venta de una finca al conde Orlock. Hutter se da cuenta de que el conde es un vampiro que pretende viajar a Alemania para atormentar a su esposa, Ellen.

programme.title: Black Hawk derribado (2001)
programme.desc: En octubre de 1993, una unidad de élite del Ejército de Estados Unidos es enviada a Mogadiscio, la capital de Somalia, para realizar una misión en plena guerra civil. Sin embargo, lo que parecía ser una misión sencilla se convierte en una pesadilla.

programme.title: El juego de mi destino (2021)
programme.desc: En un centro de detención juvenil, un consejero transforma a un grupo de criminales en un equipo de fútbol americano para enseñarles sobre el autoestima y la responsabilidad social.

programme.title: La quinta ola (2016)
programme.desc: Con la humanidad a punto de extinguirse tras cuatro devastadores ataques alienígenas, la joven Cassey, de 16 años, intenta encontrar y proteger a su hermano pequeño durante la quinta ofensiva extraterrestre.

programme.title: Shrek: Las historias de la ciénaga (2008)
programme.desc: Un ogro llamado Shrek vive en su pantano, pero su preciada soledad se ve súbitamente interrumpida por la invasión de los ruidosos personajes de los cuentos de hadas. Todos fueron expulsados de sus reinos por el malvado Lord Farquaad. Decidido a salvar su hogar, Shrek hace un trato con Farquaad y se prepara para rescatar a la princesa Fiona, quien será la esposa de Farquaad.

programme.title: Sombras tenebrosas (2012)
programme.desc: Barnabas Collins, un mujeriego rico y poderoso, dirige la ciudad de Collinsport. Barnabas sella su propio destino cuando rompe el corazón de una bruja llamada Angelique. Ella lo transforma en un vampiro y lo entierra vivo. Dos siglos más tarde, Barnabas escapa de su tumba y descubre que Collinsport, en 1972, es un lugar muy diferente y su hacienda está en ruinas.

programme.title: Oblivion Battery (2024)
programme.desc: Jack Harper y Victoria Olsen son los únicos habitantes de la Tierra, destruida hace sesenta años. Harper, un mecánico de aviación, rescata a una mujer antes de abandonar la Tierra para siempre e inicia una batalla para salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Megalodón 2: La fosa (2023)
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor lidera un equipo de investigación en las profundidades del océano. Acorralados por colosales tiburones prehistóricos y despiadados bandidos, los científicos intentan sobrevivir a toda costa.

programme.title: Monkey Man (2024)
programme.desc: Kid observa a los hombres del mafioso Rana masacrar su aldea y matar a su madre. Años más tarde, convertido en un peleador que usa una máscara de mono, Kid trama un complejo plan para hacer sufrir a Rana y vengar el asesinato de su madre.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter (2024)
programme.desc: Una niña salvó a Kraven de la muerte y le confirió los poderes de los animales. Años después, convertido en un justiciero, se enfrenta a una banda de criminales que ha secuestrado a su hermano para tenderle una trampa y asesinarlo.

programme.title: The Dream Team with Annabelle and Michael (2003)
programme.desc: John Form encuentra el regalo perfecto para Mia, su esposa embarazada: una preciosa muñeca antigua llamada Annabelle. Una noche, una secta satánica les ataca brutalmente y provocan que un ente maligno se apodere de Annabelle.

programme.title: Demonio negro (1999)
programme.desc: Las idílicas vacaciones de una familia se convierten en una pesadilla cuando el grupo queda varado en una plataforma petrolífera, a merced de un tiburón gigante, un megalodón hambriento.

programme.title: Háblame de amor (1999)
programme.desc: Mia piensa cada día en la muerte de su madre, fallecida en circunstancias poco claras. Un día, ella y su grupo de amigos encuentran una mano embalsamada que permite invocar a los espíritus, pero hay puertas que, una vez abiertas, no se pueden cerrar.

programme.title: Operación U.N.C.L.E. (2015)
programme.desc: A principios de la década de 1960, el agente de la CIA, Napoleon Solo, y el oficial de la KGB, Illya Kuryakin, participan en una misión conjunta en contra de una misteriosa organización criminal, la cual intenta crear armas nucleares.

programme.title: Diamante de sangre (2006)
programme.desc: Dos hombres, un mercenario sudafricano y un pescador, acompañados por una periodista estadounidense, se unen en la búsqueda de una gema extraña, de valor incalculable, que podría cambiar sus vidas.

programme.title: Superpoli de centro comercial (2009)
programme.desc: Un grupo de criminales cierra un centro comercial de Nueva Jersey y un vigilante de seguridad debe sacar a relucir su lado más heroico para salvar el día.

programme.title: Superpoli en Las Vegas (2015)
programme.desc: Paul Blart lleva a su hija adolescente con él a Las Vegas a una exposición de guardias de seguridad. Mientras están ahí, él se enfrenta a un robo y tiene que detener a los criminales.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love. (2011)
programme.desc: Cal Weaver está viviendo el sueño americano. Él tiene un buen trabajo, una casa preciosa, niños excelentes y una esposa hermosa, llamada Emily. Sin embargo, la aparente vida perfecta de Cal se derrumba cuando descubre que Emily le ha sido infiel y quiere divorciarse. Ahora, con más de 40 años, e inesperadamente soltero, Cal ingresa al vicioso mundo de las citas románticas. Jacob Palmer decide ayudar a Cal y le enseña a tener éxito con las damas.

programme.title: Madame Web (2024)
programme.desc: Una paramédica de Manhattan que se ve obligada a enfrentarse a revelaciones sobre su pasado forja una relación con tres jóvenes destinadas a tener un futuro poderoso, si consiguen sobrevivir a un presente mortal.

programme.title: La acompañante (2025)
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos va a pasar el fin de semana a la finca de un excéntrico millonario, novio de una de ellos. Allí una de las chicas asesina al dueño de la mansión para evitar que la viole, pero, entonces, descubre que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Carta blanca (2011)
programme.desc: Dos amigos lamentan que el matrimonio les haya arruinado toda posibilidad de diversión. Sus esposas deciden concederles un fin de semana de libertad en el que podrán hacer todo lo que quieran, sin remordimientos ni explicaciones.

programme.title: Baby Driver (2017)
programme.desc: Baby es un chofer especializado en fugas que, enamorado, pretende dejar la vida criminal y empezar de cero con la mujer que ama. Cuando el jefe de una banda de gánsters le obliga a trabajar para él y la operación fracasa, su vida y la de su chica pasan a estar en peligro.

programme.title: Twisted Metal (2023)
programme.desc: John y Quiet planean un robo para conseguir armamento. Sweet Tooth y Stu son arrastrados a la operación.

programme.title: Expediente Warren: El último rito (2025)
programme.desc: Ed y Lorraine Warren, renombrados demonólogos e investigadores de lo paranormal, se enfrentan de nuevo a las fuerzas infernales. En esta ocasión, viajan hasta el norte de Londres para tratar de ayudar a una madre y sus cuatro hijos, quienes habitan en una casa plagada de espíritus malignos.

programme.title: La acompañante (2025)
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos va a pasar el fin de semana a la finca de un excéntrico millonario, novio de una de ellos. Allí una de las chicas asesina al dueño de la mansión para evitar que la viole, pero, entonces, descubre que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Pecadores (2003)
programme.desc: Con el objetivo de dejar atrás sus turbulentas vidas, dos hermanos gemelos regresan a su ciudad natal para comenzar de nuevo. Una vez allí, descubrirán que un mal espera al acecho para recibirlos.

programme.title: Enemigo íntimo (2018)
programme.desc: Un policía de Nueva York descubre que su huésped irlandés es un terrorista que busca armas estadounidenses.

programme.title: Vidas ajenas (2004)
programme.desc: Una agente del FBI, experta en mentes criminales, se ve atrapada en el misterioso plan de un asesino en serie, haciéndola desconfiar de sí misma y de todo aquel que la rodea.

programme.title: Vidas ajenas (2004)
programme.desc: Una agente del FBI, experta en mentes criminales, se ve atrapada en el misterioso plan de un asesino en serie, haciéndola desconfiar de sí misma y de todo aquel que la rodea.

programme.title: Cómo acabar con tu jefe (2011)
programme.desc: Nick, Dale y Kurt son unos trabajadores que no desean otra cosa que deshacerse de sus insoportables jefes. El renunciar a sus trabajos no es una opción, por lo que, borrachos y siguiendo el consejo de un criminal, los hombres idean un plan complejo y aparentemente infalible para eliminar permanentemente a sus terribles jefes. El problema es que el plan no sale como lo habían diseñado.

programme.title: Warcraft: El origen (2016)
programme.desc: El pacífico reino de Azeroth está a punto de entrar en guerra contra unos terribles invasores que han dejado su destruido reino para colonizar otro. Dos héroes están a punto de chocar y cambiar el destino de su familia, su pueblo y su hogar.

programme.title: Wonka (2023)
programme.desc: Armado únicamente con muchos sueños y ganas de aventura, el joven chocolatero Willy Wonka conoce a los oompa-loompas y se dispone a cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Twisted Metal (2023)
programme.desc: John y Quiet planean un robo para conseguir armamento. Sweet Tooth y Stu son arrastrados a la operación.

programme.title: Jurassic Park (Parque Jurásico) (1993)
programme.desc: Tres expertos y otras personas son invitados a un parque de diversiones, donde se encuentran dinosaurios creados en base al ADN.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die (2024)
programme.desc: Los agentes Mike Lowrey y Marcus Burnett intentan limpiar la reputación de su jefe, a quien han acusado de trabajar para un cartel de narcotraficantes.

programme.title: Wicked! (2000)
programme.desc: Una mujer llamada Elphaba forja una improbable amistad con Glinda, una estudiante muy amada por todos. Pronto, su relación llega a una encrucijada, por lo que sus vidas toman caminos muy diferentes.

programme.title: The Fall Guy (1981)
programme.desc: El doble de acción Colt Seavers sufre una lesión y abandona la profesión, pero regresa para participar en una película que dirigirá la mujer de la que está enamorado. Todo se complica cuando la estrella del filme, en deuda con narcos, desaparece.

programme.title: Wonka (2023)
programme.desc: Armado únicamente con muchos sueños y ganas de aventura, el joven chocolatero Willy Wonka conoce a los oompa-loompas y se dispone a cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Abigail (1988)
programme.desc: Un grupo de delincuentes de poco nivel secuestra a la hija de 12 años de un conocido mafioso. Mientras la mantienen cautiva en una mansión aislada, descubren que la niña es una vampira sedienta de sangre.

programme.title: El Plan Perfecto (2017)
programme.desc: La historia de un policía duro, el detective Frazier, quien enfrenta a un inteligente ladrón de bancos, Dalton, en un tenso drama de rehenes. A medida que se desarrolla el peligroso juego del gato y el ratón, surge un comodín: Madaline, una corredora de poder con una agenda oculta, que inyecta aún más inestabilidad en una situación ya volátil.

programme.title: Pesadillas (1995)
programme.desc: Zach llega a un pequeño y aburrido pueblo, donde pronto hace amistad con la vecina. Descubre que su padre es el escritor R. L. Stine, autor de los libros de terror "Escalofríos", y que todos los monstruos que Stine describió en sus obras son reales. Estos seres diabólicos escapan y, ahora, con la ayuda del propio escritor, de su hija y de un amigo, intentarán encerrarlos de nuevo.

programme.title: Spiderman (1978)
programme.desc: Luego de sufrir la picadura de una araña genéticamente modificada, un estudiante de secundaria tímido y torpe adquiere increíbles capacidades como arácnido. Pronto comprenderá que su misión es utilizarlas para luchar contra el mal y defender a sus vecinos.

programme.title: Blue Beetle (2023)
programme.desc: El Escarabajo, una antigua reliquia extraterrestre, elige al estudiante Jaime Reyes como el huésped simbiótico en cuyo cuerpo resguardarse. A partir de ese momento, Jaime desarrolla una armadura que le otorga poderes increíbles e impredecibles.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4 (2024)
programme.desc: Po está entrenando a un nuevo guerrero que ocupe su lugar para que él pueda convertirse en líder espiritual del Valle de la Paz. Sin embargo, la irrupción de una malvada hechicera que puede cambiar de apariencia trastoca sus planes.

programme.title: Batman vs Superman: El amanecer de la justicia (2016)
programme.desc: Batman se enfrenta a Superman, temeroso de que su afán de poder termine nublando su lucha contra la injusticia y lo convierta en un villano. Mientras los héroes pelean, una amenaza terrible se cierne sobre la humanidad.

programme.title: Marcial Maciel, el lobo De Dios (2025)
programme.desc: Los informes de abuso sexual infantil y la muerte de Juan Pablo II son el preámbulo de la caída del imperio de Maciel.

programme.title: Operación Kandahar (2023)
programme.desc: Un agente de la CIA debe abrirse camino en territorio hostil hasta un punto de extracción en Kandahar.

programme.title: Blue Beetle (2023)
programme.desc: El Escarabajo, una antigua reliquia extraterrestre, elige al estudiante Jaime Reyes como el huésped simbiótico en cuyo cuerpo resguardarse. A partir de ese momento, Jaime desarrolla una armadura que le otorga poderes increíbles e impredecibles.

programme.title: Batman vs Superman: El amanecer de la justicia (2016)
programme.desc: It's been nearly two years since Superman's (Henry Cavill) colossal battle with Zod (Michael Shannon) devastated the city of Metropolis. The loss of life and collateral damage left many feeling angry and helpless, including crime-fighting billionaire Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck). Convinced that Superman is now a threat to humanity, Batman embarks on a personal vendetta to end his reign on Earth, while the conniving Lex Luthor (Jesse Eisenberg) launches his own crusade against the Man of Steel.

programme.title: Superman (1988)
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman II (1980)
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman III (1983)
programme.desc: Computer programmer Gus Gorman (Richard Pryor) is hired by financial tycoon Ross Webster (Robert Vaughn) to seize control of a weather satellite and annihilate Colombia's coffee crop. When Superman (Christopher Reeve) manages to thwart the plan, Webster commands Gorman to use the satellite to locate kryptonite, the Man of Steel's mortal weakness. But a missing unknown element in the kryptonite -- replaced by Gorman with tar -- causes an unintended side effect when presented to Superman.

programme.title: Superman IV: En busca de la paz (1987)
programme.desc: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive material to create Nuclear Man (Mark Pillow), a being just as powerful as the man of steel.

programme.title: Fist Fight (2018)
programme.desc: On the last day before summer vacation, high school teacher Andy Campbell tries his best to keep it together amid senior pranks, a dysfunctional administration and budget cuts that threaten his job. Things go from bad to worse when he crosses Ron Strickland, the school's toughest and most feared teacher. When Strickland gets fired, he challenges Campbell to a fight after school. As news of the showdown spreads like wildfire, poor Andy desperately seeks any way out of his date with certain doom.

programme.title: Mickey 17 (2025)
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Hard Knocks (2001)
programme.desc: Head coach Sean McDermott and general manager Brandon Beane are featured alongside the 2024 NFL Most Valuable Player, quarterback Josh Allen, and an array of veteran and rookie players training at St. John Fisher University in Pittsford, New York.

programme.title: El hobbit: Un viaje inesperado (2012)
programme.desc: Bilbo Baggins (Martin Freeman) lives a simple life with his fellow hobbits in the shire, until the wizard Gandalf (Ian McKellen) arrives and convinces him to join a group of dwarves on a quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor. The journey takes Bilbo on a path through treacherous lands swarming with orcs, goblins and other dangers, not the least of which is an encounter with Gollum (Andy Serkis) and a simple gold ring that is tied to the fate of Middle Earth in ways Bilbo cannot even fathom.

programme.title: El hobbit: La desolación de Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: Having survived the first part of their unsettling journey, Bilbo Baggins (Martin Freeman) and his companions (Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage) continue east. More dangers await them, including the skin-changer Beorn and the giant spiders of Milkwood. After escaping capture by the dangerous Wood Elves, Bilbo and the dwarves journey to Lake-town and, finally, to the Lonely Mountain, where they face the greatest danger of all: the fearsome dragon Smaug (Benedict Cumberbatch).

programme.title: Hard Knocks (2001)
programme.desc: Head coach Sean McDermott and general manager Brandon Beane are featured alongside the 2024 NFL Most Valuable Player, quarterback Josh Allen, and an array of veteran and rookie players training at St. John Fisher University in Pittsford, New York.

programme.title: Shaolin vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power (2006)
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: Posesión infernal: El despertar (2023)
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Escuadrón suicida isekai (2024)
programme.desc: Figuring they're all expendable, a U.S. intelligence officer decides to assemble a team of dangerous, incarcerated supervillains for a top-secret mission. Now armed with government weapons, Deadshot, Harley Quinn, Captain Boomerang, Killer Croc and other despicable inmates must learn to work together. Dubbed Task Force X, the criminals unite to battle a mysterious and powerful entity, while the diabolical Joker launches an evil agenda of his own.

programme.title: El escuadrón suicida (2021)
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: El gran Lebowski (1998)
programme.desc: Jeff Bridges plays Jeff Lebowski who insists on being called "the Dude," a laid-back, easygoing burnout who happens to have the same name as a millionaire whose wife owes a lot of dangerous people a whole bunch of money -- resulting in the Dude having his rug soiled, sending him spiraling into the Los Angeles underworld.

programme.title: Real Time with Bill Maher (2003)
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: And Just Like That… (2021)
programme.desc: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

programme.title: Destino final: Lazos de sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Hard Knocks (2001)
programme.desc: Head coach Sean McDermott and general manager Brandon Beane are featured alongside the 2024 NFL Most Valuable Player, quarterback Josh Allen, and an array of veteran and rookie players training at St. John Fisher University in Pittsford, New York.

programme.title: The Batman (2004)
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: El limpiador (2021)
programme.desc: Hoping to expose corruption, radical activists take 300 hostages at an energy company's annual gala in a high-rise building. Their cause soon gets hijacked by an extremist within their ranks who's ready to kill everyone. It's now up to a former soldier who works as a window cleaner to save the hostages trapped inside, including her younger brother.

programme.title: Beetlejuice (1989)
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Real Time with Bill Maher (2003)
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: You hurt my feelings (2023)
programme.desc: A novelist's long-standing marriage is suddenly upended when she overhears her husband give his honest reaction to her latest book.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: Detective Mare Sheehan revives an unsolved missing person's case amid increased community pressure; Mare attends a celebration for her legendary high school basketball win and connects with Richard, a professor who's new in town.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: Mare visits a grisly murder scene before informing the victim's enraged father; as a video from the night of the crime surfaces, Mare questions suspects in the case and gives an icy welcome to county Detective Colin Zabel, called in to assist.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: As Mare and Colin parse new physical evidence, phone records lead to an unlikely suspect; after lashing out at Helen about a possible custody fight over Drew, Mare receives some unprompted advice from Richard on how to move forward with Carrie.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: With Mare forced to take a backseat on the case, Colin presses a local priest about the vague circumstances that prompted his transfer to the parish; an anonymous call gives Dawn hope that Katie might still be alive.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: In her mandated therapy, Mare opens up about her family's history with mental health; Lori tries to get to the bottom of her son's outburst at school; Mare meets with a semi-retired source to help find a possible connection to her three cases.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: After a heroic rescue lands her in the hospital, Mare awakes to the unshakeable pain of losing a friend. Then, given a second chance by Chief Carter, Mare reevaluates old suspects, which leads to a shocking clue.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown (2021)
programme.desc: When her case takes a devastating turn, Mare's family and friends process the fallout while she attempts to find her own way forward.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners (1962)
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: Invitation (1999)
programme.desc: After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, Evie's at first seduced by the sexy aristocratic host. However, she's soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets about her family history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

programme.title: Portrait of a Cat Lady on Fire (2023)
programme.desc: In 1770 the young daughter of a French countess develops a mutual attraction to the female artist commissioned to paint her wedding portrait.

programme.title: Escapada perfecta (2009)
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cliff (Steve Zahn) and Cydney (Milla Jovovich) are celebrating their honeymoon by hiking through a secluded region of Hawaii. Their idyllic trek takes a dark turn when they find a group of frightened hikers who claim that another couple has been brutally murdered. Far from civilization and unsure who to trust, Cydney and Cliff soon get locked into a terrifying battle for survival.

programme.title: Los Juegos del Hambre (2012)
programme.desc: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

programme.title: Los Juegos del Hambre: En llamas (2013)
programme.desc: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

programme.title: Los Juegos del Hambre: Sinsajo - Parte 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Following her rescue from the devastating Quarter Quell, Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) awakes in the complex beneath the supposedly destroyed District 13. Her home, District 12, has been reduced to rubble, and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) is now the brainwashed captive of President Snow (Donald Sutherland). At the same time, Katniss also learns about a secret rebellion spreading throughout all of Panem -- a rebellion that will place her at the center of a plot to turn the tables on Snow.

programme.title: Los Juegos del Hambre: Sinsajo - Parte 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Realizing the stakes are no longer just for survival, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) teams up with her closest friends, including Peeta (Josh Hutcherson), Gale (Liam Hemsworth) and Finnick for the ultimate mission. Together, they leave District 13 to liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem and assassinate President Snow, who's obsessed with destroying Katniss. What lies ahead are mortal traps, dangerous enemies and moral choices that will ultimately determine the future of millions.

programme.title: Real Time with Bill Maher (2003)
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: Bullet Train, Save the Earth (2022)
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: The King's Woman (2017)
programme.desc: In the 1800s, a group of all-female warriors protects the African kingdom of Dahomey with skills and fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Faced with a new threat, Gen. Nanisca trains the next generation of recruits to fight against a foreign enemy that's determined to destroy their way of life.

programme.title: Babygirl (2024)
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: MTV Couples Retreat (2021)
programme.desc: Four couples, all friends, descend on a tropical island resort. Though one husband and wife are there to work on their marriage, the others just want to enjoy some fun in the sun. They soon find out that the paradise comes at a price, participation in couples therapy sessions is mandatory. What started out as a cut-rate vacation turns into an examination of the common problems many face.

programme.title: Task (2025)
programme.desc: An FBI agent heads a Task Force to put an end to a string of violent robberies led by an unsuspecting family man.

programme.title: Emmanuelle in Space (1994)
programme.desc: In search of a lost pleasure, Emmanuelle flies alone to Hong Kong and meets a man who constantly eludes her.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: La Leyenda de Ochi (2025)
programme.desc: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

programme.title: Bad Santa (2003)
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a small boy brings out his kinder side, Willie begins to wonder if there is still some hope for him.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who raises the bar for the gang's ambitions, while somehow lowering the standards of criminal behavior.

programme.title: Real Time with Bill Maher (2003)
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: Task (2025)
programme.desc: An FBI agent heads a Task Force to put an end to a string of violent robberies led by an unsuspecting family man.

programme.title: Amanecer rojo (1984)
programme.desc: When North Korean troops invade U.S. soil and take over the city of Spokane, Wash., a recently returned Iraq War veteran and a group of teens flee to the woods and form a band of freedom fighters. Dubbing themselves the Wolverines, the youths launch guerrilla attacks against the invaders, but how long they can sustain the fight in the face of the enemy's superior numbers and firepower remains in question.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (2014)
programme.desc: John Oliver returns for season 12 of this Emmy winning series that takes a satirical, insightful look at current events.

programme.title: Task (2025)
programme.desc: An FBI agent heads a Task Force to put an end to a string of violent robberies led by an unsuspecting family man.

programme.title: Cuentos extraños (2025)
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Selena (2006)
programme.desc: In this biographical drama, Selena Quintanilla (Jennifer Lopez) is born into a musical Mexican-American family in Texas. Her father, Abraham (Edward James Olmos), realizes that his young daughter is talented and begins performing with her at small venues. She finds success and falls for her guitarist, Chris Perez (Jon Seda), who draws the ire of her father. Seeking mainstream stardom, Selena begins recording an English-language album which, tragically, she would never complete.

programme.title: Alvin y las ardillas 3 (2011)
programme.desc: Dave Seville, the Chipmunks and the Chipettes are taking a luxury cruise to the International Music Awards. Of course, Alvin cannot resist the urge to create havoc, and the singing rodents soon find themselves marooned on a seemingly deserted island. While Dave and an unlikely ally launch a search, Alvin and company discover that they are not alone on the island, as they first thought.

programme.title: Valentine's Day (1964)
programme.desc: In a series of interconnected stories, various Los Angeles residents (Jessica Alba, Jessica Biel, Bradley Cooper) wend their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day. As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.title: Yvonne Orji: A Whole Me (2022)
programme.desc: Orji uses therapy as a through line to discuss her thoughts on friendship, dating, adulting and why guys need better friends; Orji shows her range while also being a no-holds-barred therapy session for all.

programme.title: Jerrod Carmichael: No seas gay (2025)
programme.desc: Emmy-winning comedian Jerrod Carmichael takes to the stage for his latest comedy special, bringing his signature blend of unbridled honesty, emotional gut punches and sharp, dry wit.

programme.title: John Early: Now More Than Ever (2023)
programme.desc: John Early brings his unique blend of cutting commentary and pop star swagger to Roulette Intermedium in Brooklyn, N.Y.; in the style of a gritty 70s rockumentary, Early performs stand-up and explosive song covers from Britney to Neil Young.

programme.title: Wonka (2023)
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

programme.title: Jerry Garcia: It's Not My Weekend (2019)
programme.desc: Rising comedian and single father Jerry Garcia makes fun of himself, his parenting style, and his dating life.

programme.title: Bullet Train, Save the Earth (2022)
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Clear History (2021)
programme.desc: A man (Larry David) hatches a plot for revenge when his former boss (Jon Hamm) visits the island that he calls home.

programme.title: El hogar de Miss Peregrine para niños peculiares (2016)
programme.desc: When his beloved grandfather leaves Jake clues to a mystery that spans different worlds and times, he finds a magical place known as Miss Peregrine's School for Peculiar Children. But the mystery and danger deepen as he gets to know the residents and learns about their special powers - and their terrifying enemies. Ultimately, Jake discovers that only his own special peculiarity can save his new friends. Based on the novel "Miss Peregrine's Home For Peculiar Children," written by Ransom Riggs.

programme.title: Waitress: The Musical (2023)
programme.desc: Jenna Hunterson is a waitress and expert pie maker stuck in a small town and a loveless marriage. When a baking contest offers her a chance at escape, Jenna fights to reclaim part of herself.

programme.title: Chris Rock: Never Scared (2004)
programme.desc: The comic performs material from "The Black Ambition Tour" at Constitution Hall in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Richard Jeni: A Big Steaming Pile of Me (2005)
programme.desc: The comic performs at the Irvine Barclay Theatre in California.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?! (2023)
programme.desc: Stand-up comic Leo Reich blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs as he muses on social and political causes, coming-of-age experiences, and the challenges of modern life.

programme.title: Tracey Ullman: Live and Exposed (2005)
programme.desc: The comic performs her autobiographical show in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bad Santa (2003)
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a small boy brings out his kinder side, Willie begins to wonder if there is still some hope for him.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who raises the bar for the gang's ambitions, while somehow lowering the standards of criminal behavior.

programme.title: Get Shorty (2017)
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) is a Miami mobster who gets sent by his boss, the psychopathic Bones Barboni (Dennis Farina), to collect a bad debt from Harry Zimm (Gene Hackman), a Hollywood producer who specializes in cheesy horror films. When Chili meets Harry's leading lady (Rene Russo), the romantic sparks fly. After pitching his own life story as a movie idea, Chili learns that being a mobster and being a Hollywood producer really aren't all that different.

programme.title: Amor y otras drogas (2010)
programme.desc: Handsome pharmaceutical salesman Jamie Randall (Jake Gyllenhaal) always has good luck with women. A chance encounter with Maggie Murdock (Anne Hathaway), a free-spirited Parkinson's patient, leads to a sexual relationship. As Jamie and Maggie become closer, each must question if a serious commitment is in their future.

programme.title: Tracey Ullman: Live and Exposed (2005)
programme.desc: The comic performs her autobiographical show in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life (2025)
programme.desc: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

programme.title: La máscara 2 (El hijo de la máscara) (2005)
programme.desc: A cartoonist and family man, Tim Avery (Jamie Kennedy) lives a peaceful existence with his wife, Tonya (Traylor Howard), as well as their infant son and dog. When the curious canine finds a mask with mystical properties, both dog and baby create chaos with its powers. While Tim and Tonya try to contain the damage, the sly Norse god Loki (Alan Cumming) comes looking for the artifact, resulting in more mishaps that ultimately incur the wrath of the deity's powerful father, Odin (Bob Hoskins).

programme.title: Colegas de copas (2013)
programme.desc: Although they're both dating other people, two co-workers (Olivia Wilde, Jake Johnson) hang out together in bars and try to ignore their mutual attraction.

programme.title: Mountainhead (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends reunite during worldwide economic turmoil.

programme.title: Los Gemstone (2019)
programme.desc: The Gemstone siblings set out to find their missing father; the family reunite with Aimee-Leigh's longtime best friend, Lori.

programme.title: Everyone Has Their Own War (2010)
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops, who make money blackmailing criminals, come up against one who may be far more dangerous than both of them.

programme.title: Opustíš-li mne (1979)
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Janey and Ashley Get a Real Job (2023)
programme.desc: A young man (Miles Teller) and his girlfriend (Anna Kendrick) struggle to find desirable employment after graduating from college.

programme.title: Heaven Help Us (1994)
programme.desc: Students (Andrew McCarthy, Kevin Dillon) reject authority in 1965 Brooklyn at St. Basil's Catholic School for Boys.

programme.title: Alex Edelman: Solo para nosotros (2024)
programme.desc: Edelman shares his experience of covertly attending a meeting of white nationalists and coming face-to-face with the people behind the keyboards.

programme.title: Un lugar para soñar (2011)
programme.desc: Following his wife's untimely death, Los Angeles journalist Benjamin Mee (Matt Damon) decides to make a fresh start by quitting his job and moving his children (Colin Ford, Maggie Elizabeth Jones) to an 18-acre property containing the Rosemoor Wildlife Park. Though closed for years, Rosemoor is still home to many animals, cared for by Kelly Foster (Scarlett Johansson) and her small staff. Mee opens his heart and his checkbook as he, Kelly and the others work to renovate and reopen the zoo.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: Nathan decides to put his resources into something big.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: In his determined effort to find a solution, Nathan draws extensively on his past.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: Nathan experiments on animals -- and himself.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: Nathan faces complications arising from a young man's romantic life.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: Nathan heads to Washington.

programme.title: Los ensayos (2022)
programme.desc: Nathan makes a big bet.

programme.title: Holidaze: The Christmas That Almost Didn't Happen
programme.desc: Walter Meyer (Danny Glover) is a retired mechanic who lost the love of his life one year earlier. Now that the holiday season is here, he invites daughters Rachel (Gabrielle Union) and Cheryl (Kimberly Elise) and sons Christian (Romany Malco) and Evan (Jessie T. Usher) to his house for a traditional celebration. Poor Walter soon realizes that if his bickering children and the rest of the family can spend five days together under the same roof, it will truly be a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Separación (2022)
programme.desc: Members (Danny Dyer, Laura Harris, Tim McInnerny) of the Palisades Defense Corp. sales group arrive in Europe for a team-building exercise. A fallen tree blocks the route, and they must hike to their destination. However, a psychotic killer lurks in the woods, and he has a horrible fate in mind for each of the co-workers.

programme.title: Spaceballs: The Animated Series (2008)
programme.desc: In a distant galaxy, planet Spaceball has depleted its air supply, leaving its citizens reliant on a product called "Perri-Air." In desperation, Spaceball's leader President Skroob (Mel Brooks) orders the evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) to kidnap Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) of oxygen-rich Druidia and hold her hostage in exchange for air. But help arrives for the Princess in the form of renegade space pilot Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-man, half-dog partner, Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: George Lopez: The Wall (2017)
programme.desc: The comic performs live from the Concert Hall at the Kennedy Center for Performing Arts in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Alvin y las ardillas 3 (2011)
programme.desc: Dave Seville, the Chipmunks and the Chipettes are taking a luxury cruise to the International Music Awards. Of course, Alvin cannot resist the urge to create havoc, and the singing rodents soon find themselves marooned on a seemingly deserted island. While Dave and an unlikely ally launch a search, Alvin and company discover that they are not alone on the island, as they first thought.

programme.title: Big Fat Quiz (2004)
programme.desc: Three men find that they have come to a turning point. Stu (Steve Martin) faces a late-life crisis, Kenny (Owen Wilson) is in the grip of a midlife crisis, and Brad (Jack Black) is wallowing in a no-life crisis. Determined to kick-start their stagnant lives, Stu, Kenny and Brad decide to enter a prestigious contest. During the course of one calendar year, the three friendly rivals criss-cross North America in a quest to count more species of birds than anyone else.

programme.title: La oveja Shaun: La película (2015)
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: Atrapa a un ladrón (2016)
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle a Chinese criminal.

programme.title: Lilo, mi amigo el cocodrilo (2022)
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son, Josh, struggles to adapt to his new school and friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle, a singing crocodile that loves baths, caviar and great music. The two become fast friends, but when evil neighbor Mr. Grumps threatens Lyle's existence, the Primms must band together to show the world that family can come from the most unexpected places.

programme.title: La barbería 2: Vuelta al negocio (2004)
programme.desc: This sequel to the 2002 film returns to the Chicago barbershop owned by Calvin Palmer Jr. (Ice Cube). His employees -- Isaac (Troy Garity), Terri (Eve), Ricky (Michael Ealy), Dinka (Leonard Earl Howze) and Kenard -- have their own personal and workplace problems, and a new barbershop called Nappy Cutz has moved in across the street. As Calvin tries to change the character of his business, Nappy Cutz and gentrification become a threat to the surrounding community.

programme.title: La agencia (2024)
programme.desc: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone (Dwayne Johnson) shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner (Kevin Hart), a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy (1994)
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Whoopi Goldberg: Back to Broadway (2005)
programme.desc: The comic performs at Lyceum Theater in New York.

programme.title: Fist Fight (2018)
programme.desc: On the last day before summer vacation, high school teacher Andy Campbell tries his best to keep it together amid senior pranks, a dysfunctional administration and budget cuts that threaten his job. Things go from bad to worse when he crosses Ron Strickland, the school's toughest and most feared teacher. When Strickland gets fired, he challenges Campbell to a fight after school. As news of the showdown spreads like wildfire, poor Andy desperately seeks any way out of his date with certain doom.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: I Said It. Y'all Thinking It. (2022)
programme.desc: Lil Rel Howery brings his signature storytelling style and impressions to the Chicago Theater, getting real on topics such as fame, fatherhood and therapy.

programme.title: Paranormal Movie 2 (2014)
programme.desc: After the ordeal he suffered with his now former girlfriend's (Essence Atkins) demonic possession, Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) has decided to start fresh. He has a new girlfriend named Megan (Jaime Pressly), and they and Megan's children are moving into their dream home. Soon afterward, Malcolm is once again plagued by supernatural shenanigans -- only this time, it's not just the house that's haunted. A demon has attached itself to Malcolm, and shows no signs of letting go.

programme.title: Mad Money (2005)
programme.desc: After her husband loses his job, upper-crust housewife Bridget Cardigan (Diane Keaton) is forced to take a job as a janitor at the Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City, Mo. Spotting a weakness in the bank's security system, Bridget convinces her two new friends Nina (Queen Latifah) and Jackie (Katie Holmes) to help her steal a fortune in worn-out bills that have been earmarked for destruction.

programme.title: Land of the Lost (1974)
programme.desc: A space-time vortex sucks scientist Rick Marshall (Will Ferrell), his assistant Holly (Anna Friel) and a survivalist Will (Danny R. McBride) into a world populated by dinosaurs and painfully slow creatures called Sleestaks. With few resources at their disposal, Rick, Holly and Will must rely on their only ally, a primate named Chaka (Jorma Taccone), to try to survive long enough to figure out a way back home.

programme.title: Scott Pilgrim contra el mundo (2010)
programme.desc: As bass guitarist for a garage-rock band, Scott Pilgrim (Michael Cera) has never had trouble getting a girlfriend; usually, the problem is getting rid of them. But when Ramona Flowers (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) skates into his heart, he finds she has the most troublesome baggage of all: an army of ex-boyfriends who will stop at nothing to eliminate him from her list of suitors.

programme.title: Snatched (2021)
programme.desc: Dumped by her boyfriend on the eve of their vacation, impetuous dreamer Emily Middleton persuades her cautious mother, Linda, to accompany her on an exotic getaway to South America. Polar opposites, Emily and Linda must soon work through their differences to escape from a wildly outrageous and dangerous jungle adventure.

programme.title: Volunteer's Playlist (2023)
programme.desc: Hoping to avoid gambling debts, rich playboy Lawrence Bourne (Tom Hanks) stows away on a plane of Peace Corps volunteers set for Thailand. Once aboard, he meets the outrageously affable Tom Tuttle (John Candy), who shows him the ropes. After landing, the crew is stationed in a small town where they are to construct a bridge. Along with the lovely and altruistic Beth Wexler (Rita Wilson), the group begins work, but soon discover the CIA, communists and a drug lord are eyeing the bridge.

programme.title: El hombre que inventó la Navidad (2017)
programme.desc: In 1843 London, author Charles Dickens finds himself in financial trouble after writing three unsuccessful novels in a row. Desperate for a hit, Dickens relies on real-life inspiration and his vivid imagination to bring Ebenezer Scrooge, Tiny Tim and other classic characters to life in A Christmas Carol, forever changing the holiday season into the celebration known today.

programme.title: Orgullo y prejuicio (1995)
programme.desc: In this adaptation of Jane Austen's beloved novel, Elizabeth Bennet (Keira Knightley) lives with her mother, father and sisters in the English countryside. As the eldest, she faces mounting pressure from her parents to marry. When the outspoken Elizabeth is introduced to the handsome and upper-class Mr. Darcy (Matthew Macfadyen), sparks fly. Although there is obvious chemistry between the two, Darcy's overly reserved nature threatens the fledgling relationship.

programme.title: George Lopez: It's Not Me, It's You (2012)
programme.desc: The comic performs at the Nokia Theatre in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Someday You'll Die (2024)
programme.desc: Nikki Glaser dives into a wide range of topics including why she doesn't want kids, the harsh realities of aging, her sexual fantasies, and plans for her own death all in her hilarious, unapologetic, and brutally honest style.

programme.title: Ricky Velez: Here's Everything (2021)
programme.desc: Ricky bares it all with his honest and down-to-earth perspective rooted in his Queens upbringing.

programme.title: George Lopez: America's Mexican (2007)
programme.desc: The comic performs at the Dodge Theater in Phoenix; topics include immigration, modern children, interracial relationships and dementia.

programme.title: Mel Brooks and Dick Cavett Together Again (2011)
programme.desc: The pair reminisce about life and show business on stage at the Saban Theatre in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Marcella Arguello: B..., Grow Up!
programme.desc: Marcella's stand-up comedy special at the Roulette Intermedium in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life (2025)
programme.desc: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

programme.title: The Hangover Games (2019)
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug (Justin Bartha) and three friends (Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis) drive to Las Vegas for a wild and memorable stag party. In fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing; nor can they find Doug. With little time to spare, the three hazy pals try to re-trace their steps and find Doug so they can get him back to Los Angeles in time to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Paddington: Aventura en la selva (2024)
programme.desc: Paddington y la familia Brown viajan al Perú porque están preocupados por la tía Lucy. Cuando llegan, descubren que ha desaparecido y las pistas de su paradero los conducen hasta un lugar enigmático y legendario ubicado en la selva amazónica.

programme.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu (2019)
programme.desc: Un joven une fuerzas con el detective Pikachu para desentrañar el misterio detrás de la desaparición de su padre. El dúo dinámico descubre una trama tortuosa que representa una amenaza para el universo Pokémon.

programme.title: El método Williams (2021)
programme.desc: Richard Williams, siguiendo un plan determinado y arriesgado, inspira a sus dos hijas, Venus y Serena, a buscar el éxito en el mundo del tenis.

programme.title: Amor a medianoche (2018)
programme.desc: Una adolescente que moriría si se expusiera a la luz vive un romance de verano con el chico del que lleva años enamorada. A medida que su relación se afianza, ella busca maneras de ocultarle la enfermedad que padece.

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: El agente J viaja al pasado y une fuerzas con un joven agente K para salvar a su compañero, la agencia y el futuro de la humanidad.

programme.title: Hotel Transilvania: La serie (2017)
programme.desc: Cuando los monstruos quieren salir de paseo, todos ellos van al Hotel Transilvania del Conde Drácula, un sitio espléndido en donde pueden ser ellos mismos sin seres humanos que los molesten. En un fin de semana especial, Drácula invita a criaturas como el Hombre Invisible, la Momia y otros a celebrar el cumpleaños 118 de su hija Mavis. Sin embargo, una complicación inesperada se desarrolla cuando un hombre ordinario llega a la fiesta y se enamora de Mavis.

programme.title: Las Supernenas (1998)
programme.desc: Tres pequeñas niñas con super poderes enfrentan a un mono malvado y a su ejército de primates modificados.

programme.title: ¡Enróllate, Scooby-Doo! (2015)
programme.desc: Con cientos de casos resueltos y aventuras compartidas, Scooby y la pandilla se enfrentan al misterio más grande y desafiante de todos los tiempos: un complot para liberar al aterrador perro fantasma Cerbero en el mundo de los vivos.

programme.title: Colegas en el bosque 2 (2008)
programme.desc: Un grupo de animales se une para rescatar a un perro salchicha secuestrado por mascotas domesticadas.

programme.title: Monster House (2006)
programme.desc: Ningún adulto le cree a tres chicos, quienes afirman que una de las casas del vecindario es una criatura viviente que se come a la gente y representa un peligro.

programme.title: Harry Potter y el prisionero de Azkaban (2004)
programme.desc: El tercer año de estudios de Harry en Hogwarts se ve amenazado por la fuga de Sirius Black de la prisión de Azkaban. Al parecer, se trata de un peligroso mago que fue cómplice de Lord Voldemort y que intentará vengarse de Harry Potter.

programme.title: Trolls: No pierdas el ritmo (2018)
programme.desc: Dos troles se embarcan en la aventura más grande de sus vidas cuando tienen que abandonar el único mundo que han conocido para rescatar a sus amigos.

programme.title: Momias (2023)
programme.desc: Tres momias egipcias recorren el Londres contemporáneo en busca de un anillo robado por el codicioso arqueólogo Lord Carnaby.

programme.title: Robot salvaje (2024)
programme.desc: Un robot llamado Roz naufraga en una isla, donde debe aprender a adaptarse a su nuevo entorno, al establecer relaciones con los animales del lugar, pronto desarrolla un vínculo paternal con un ganso huérfano.

programme.title: Una película de Minecraft (2025)
programme.desc: Cuatro inadaptados son arrastrados por un portal al Overworld, un misterioso lugar que se nutre de la imaginación. Para volver a casa, tendrán que dominar el terreno mientras se embarcan en una búsqueda con un artesano llamado Steve.

programme.title: Dead Pixels (IN) (2023)
programme.desc: Excampeones de juegos de arcade deben jugar una última y legendaria partida. Cuando los aliens malinterpretan una señal enviada por la Tierra como una declaración de guerra, atacan el planeta imitando videojuegos retro.

programme.title: La casa del reloj en la pared (2018)
programme.desc: Un niño que ha quedado huérfano debe mudarse con su tío a una misteriosa casa en la que descubrirá un mundo de hechiceros y maldiciones. Deberá ayudar a su tío, un ávido brujo, a encontrar un reloj con el poder de causar el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Corazón de tinta (2008)
programme.desc: Un hombre tiene la habilidad de dar vida a los personajes de un libro y, accidentalmente, trae al mundo real a uno de los villanos más malvados de la literatura.

programme.title: Jardín de meteoros (Meteor Garden) (2018)
programme.desc: Después de rechazar una lucrativa oferta de un empresario, Speed Racer descubre que algunas de las más importantes carreras están arregladas por magnates sin principios, que manipulan a los principales pilotos de carrera para tener más ganancias.

programme.title: Trolls: No pierdas el ritmo (2018)
programme.desc: Dos troles se embarcan en la aventura más grande de sus vidas cuando tienen que abandonar el único mundo que han conocido para rescatar a sus amigos.

programme.title: Guerrero: La película (2016)
programme.desc: Paolo, un niño de diez años, quiere conocer a su papá, un jugador de fútbol desconocido que debió abandonar el deporte por una lesión. Sin saberlo, ese reencuentro marcará una transformación que lo llevará a ser una estrella del fútbol.

programme.title: La flauta mágica (2022)
programme.desc: Después de descubrir una puerta mística en la biblioteca de una escuela, un estudiante de Música se ve arrastrado al fantástico cosmos de la ópera "La flauta mágica" de Mozart, donde la imaginación no tiene límites y la Reina de la Noche gobierna.

programme.title: Ga'Hoole: La leyenda de los guardianes (2010)
programme.desc: Al joven búho Soren le apasiona escuchar las historias de los legendarios guerreros que salvaron a los búhos de los malvados Puros, pero su hermano Kludd se burla de ellas. Hasta que una noche, mientras vuelan, los Puros secuestran a ambos.

programme.title: Harry Potter y el cáliz de fuego (2005)
programme.desc: Hogwarts se prepara para el Torneo de los Tres Magos, en el que competirán tres escuelas de hechicería. Para sorpresa de todos, Harry Potter es elegido para participar en la competencia, en la que deberá luchar contra dragones, internarse en el agua y enfrentarse a sus mayores miedos.

programme.title: Los pitufos (1981)
programme.desc: Gargamel descubre la aldea mágica de los pitufos y provoca con sus malas artes que la abandonen y se dispersen por el bosque. Por desgracia, uno de ellos se equivoca de camino y, junto con otros pitufos, entra en una ruta prohibida. La luna azul y un portal mágico los transporta a Manhattan, Nueva York.

programme.title: La vida secreta de nuestras mascotas (2022)
programme.desc: La vida secreta de seis mascotas y todo lo que hacen cuando sus dueños salen de la casa, desde mirar la televisión hasta vaciar la heladera, hasta que todo queda al descubierto.

programme.title: Paddington: Aventura en la selva (2024)
programme.desc: Paddington y la familia Brown viajan al Perú porque están preocupados por la tía Lucy. Cuando llegan, descubren que ha desaparecido y las pistas de su paradero los conducen hasta un lugar enigmático y legendario ubicado en la selva amazónica.

programme.title: Cazafantasmas: Imperio helado (2024)
programme.desc: La familia Spengler regresa a la famosa estación de bomberos de la ciudad de Nueva York con los cazafantasmas originales. Cuando un antiguo artefacto desata una fuerza maligna, los cazafantasmas nuevos y antiguos deben unirse para proteger el mundo.

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: El agente J viaja al pasado y une fuerzas con un joven agente K para salvar a su compañero, la agencia y el futuro de la humanidad.

programme.title: Las crónicas de Blancanieves: El cazador y la reina del hielo (2016)
programme.desc: Un cazador es enviado por una reina malvada a que capture a una princesa fugitiva, pero el hombre se convierte en su protector y la ayuda en su búsqueda para recuperar el control del reino.

programme.title: La brújula dorada (2007)
programme.desc: En un mundo paralelo, una niña realiza una búsqueda épica para salvar a su mejor amigo y a otros niños secuestrados por los experimentos del malvado Magisterio.

programme.title: Ga'Hoole: La leyenda de los guardianes (2010)
programme.desc: Al joven búho Soren le apasiona escuchar las historias de los legendarios guerreros que salvaron a los búhos de los malvados Puros, pero su hermano Kludd se burla de ellas. Hasta que una noche, mientras vuelan, los Puros secuestran a ambos.

programme.title: La vida secreta de nuestras mascotas (2022)
programme.desc: La vida secreta de seis mascotas y todo lo que hacen cuando sus dueños salen de la casa, desde mirar la televisión hasta vaciar la heladera, hasta que todo queda al descubierto.

programme.title: El Grinch (2018)
programme.desc: Cuando todos deciden hacer que la Navidad sea más grande, más ruidosa y más brillante, el descontento Grinch trama un plan para hacerse pasar por Santa Claus, robar la Navidad y silenciar la alegría festiva de una vez por todas.

programme.title: Trolls 3: Todos juntos (2023)
programme.desc: Branch y Poppy emprenden un viaje para salvar a Floyd, el hermano de Branch, al que ha secuestrado una pareja de villanos estrellas del pop.

programme.title: Gru 4. Mi villano favorito (2024)
programme.desc: Gru y su familia deben adoptar identidades falsas para ocultarse de un supervillano, un antiguo compañero de la escuela de Gru que le guarda rencor desde pequeño y pretende convertir a la familia en híbridos entre humano y cucaracha.

programme.title: El amanecer de los Croods (2015)
programme.desc: Una familia cavernícola busca un nuevo hogar después de que el suyo sea destruido. Mientras avanzan por un mundo desconocido, se encuentran con un nómada que deja a todos fascinados.

programme.title: Momias (2023)
programme.desc: Tres momias egipcias recorren el Londres contemporáneo en busca de un anillo robado por el codicioso arqueólogo Lord Carnaby.

programme.title: Paddington: Aventura en la selva (2024)
programme.desc: Paddington y la familia Brown viajan al Perú porque están preocupados por la tía Lucy. Cuando llegan, descubren que ha desaparecido y las pistas de su paradero los conducen hasta un lugar enigmático y legendario ubicado en la selva amazónica.

programme.title: Garfield: La película (2024)
programme.desc: El mimado gato casero Garfield se reencuentra con su padre, el gato callejero Vic, de quien hace mucho que no sabía nada. Vic arrastra a su hijo y a Odie, el perrito que vive con Garfield, a una trepidante aventura lejos de casa.

programme.title: Minions & Gru's Diary (2017)
programme.desc: Los minions, ingenuos y torpes, buscan un verdadero villano al que servir. A lo largo de una evolución de millones de años, los minions se han puesto al servicio de los amos más despreciables. Kevin, acompañado por el rebelde Stuart y el adorable Bob, emprende un emocionante viaje para conseguir una jefa a quien servir, la terrible Scarlet Overkill.

programme.title: Gru 4. Mi villano favorito (2024)
programme.desc: Gru y su familia deben adoptar identidades falsas para ocultarse de un supervillano, un antiguo compañero de la escuela de Gru que le guarda rencor desde pequeño y pretende convertir a la familia en híbridos entre humano y cucaracha.

programme.title: Trolls 3: Todos juntos (2023)
programme.desc: Branch y Poppy emprenden un viaje para salvar a Floyd, el hermano de Branch, al que ha secuestrado una pareja de villanos estrellas del pop.

programme.title: Beetlejuice (1989)
programme.desc: Después de una tragedia, tres generaciones de la familia Deetz regresan a Winter River. Aún atormentada por Beetlejuice, la vida de Lydia da un vuelco cuando su rebelde hija adolescente, Astrid, descubre el misterioso modelo de la ciudad en el ático.

programme.title: Animales fantásticos: Los secretos de Dumbledore (2022)
programme.desc: El poderoso mago Grindelwald se está moviendo para tomar el control del mundo mágico. Incapaz de detenerlo solo, el profesor Dumbledore le encarga al magizoólogo Newt Scamander una peligrosa misión.

programme.title: Annie: La Película
programme.desc: Una joven valiente escapa de las garras de su malvada madre adoptiva y se las arregla para cautivar a un magnate que se postula para ser alcalde.

programme.title: Minions & Gru's Diary (2017)
programme.desc: Los minions, ingenuos y torpes, buscan un verdadero villano al que servir. A lo largo de una evolución de millones de años, los minions se han puesto al servicio de los amos más despreciables. Kevin, acompañado por el rebelde Stuart y el adorable Bob, emprende un emocionante viaje para conseguir una jefa a quien servir, la terrible Scarlet Overkill.

programme.title: Cómo entrenar a tu dragón 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Al descubrir una cueva secreta llena de dragones salvajes y su misterioso benefactor, Hipo y Chimuelo deberán librar una batalla para proteger la paz de Berk.

programme.title: Una película de Minecraft (2025)
programme.desc: Cuatro inadaptados son arrastrados por un portal al Overworld, un misterioso lugar que se nutre de la imaginación. Para volver a casa, tendrán que dominar el terreno mientras se embarcan en una búsqueda con un artesano llamado Steve.

programme.title: Antz: Hormiguitaz
programme.desc: Una hormiga inconforme perturba la vida de la colonia al pretender ser soldado y enamorarse de una princesa.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny (2018)
programme.desc: Un panda bonachón es elegido para cumplir una antigua profecía: debe convertirse en un experto en artes marciales y defender a su gente de un poderoso enemigo.

programme.title: Hotel Transilvania: La serie (2017)
programme.desc: Cuando los monstruos quieren salir de paseo, todos ellos van al Hotel Transilvania del Conde Drácula, un sitio espléndido en donde pueden ser ellos mismos sin seres humanos que los molesten. En un fin de semana especial, Drácula invita a criaturas como el Hombre Invisible, la Momia y otros a celebrar el cumpleaños 118 de su hija Mavis. Sin embargo, una complicación inesperada se desarrolla cuando un hombre ordinario llega a la fiesta y se enamora de Mavis.

programme.title: El bebé jefazo: Vuelta a la cuna (2022)
programme.desc: Tim, de 7 años, tiene celos de su hermano, un bebé que viste traje y corbata, hasta que descubre que el bebé puede hablar. Los hermanos protagonizan una misión secreta contra un villano que pretende acabar con el amor de los niños por las mascotas.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)
programme.desc: En esta tercera aventura panda, Po deberá enfrentar dos desafíos épicos: uno, de origen sobrenatural, y el otro, muy cerca de su hogar, con la aparición de quien dice ser su padre biológico.

programme.title: Una película de Minecraft (2025)
programme.desc: Cuatro inadaptados son arrastrados por un portal al Overworld, un misterioso lugar que se nutre de la imaginación. Para volver a casa, tendrán que dominar el terreno mientras se embarcan en una búsqueda con un artesano llamado Steve.
