Dating disaster ensues when Daphne tries to achieve her goal by placing an online personal ad for Milly.

programme.title: Role Models (2022)
programme.desc: After salesmen Danny (Paul Rudd) and Wheeler (Seann William Scott) trash a company truck, the court gives them a choice: jail time or community service in a mentoring program. Thinking to take the easy way out, the two overgrown adolescents find themselves paired with a teenager (Christopher Mintz-Plasse), who is experiencing the pangs of first love, and a foul-mouthed fifth-grader (Bobb'e J. Thompson), who needs an attitude adjustment.

Dating disaster ensues when Daphne tries to achieve her goal by placing an online personal ad for Milly.

programme.title: An Evening with Beverly Luff Linn (2018)
programme.desc: Lulu Danger's unhappy marriage takes a turn for the worse when a mysterious man from her past comes to town to perform.

programme.title: Role Models (2022)
programme.desc: After salesmen Danny (Paul Rudd) and Wheeler (Seann William Scott) trash a company truck, the court gives them a choice: jail time or community service in a mentoring program. Thinking to take the easy way out, the two overgrown adolescents find themselves paired with a teenager (Christopher Mintz-Plasse), who is experiencing the pangs of first love, and a foul-mouthed fifth-grader (Bobb'e J. Thompson), who needs an attitude adjustment.

programme.title: Ases calientes (2006)
programme.desc: Sleazy entertainer Buddy "Aces" Israel (Jeremy Piven) incurs the wrath of crime boss Primo Sparazza when he agrees to testify against the Las Vegas mob. Two FBI agents (Ray Liotta, Ryan Reynolds) have the difficult task of protecting him from a motley assortment of bounty hunters, hit men and nefarious vixens who are converging on his Lake Tahoe encampment to rub him out and collect a hefty reward.

programme.title: Ases calientes 2: Baile de asesinos (2010)
programme.desc: Lowly FBI clerk Walter Weed (Tom Berenger) unwittingly becomes the target of assassins when gangland kingpin Hal Leuco places a bounty on his life. Responding to the call, a motley assortment of hit men -- including poisons expert Ariella Martinez (Martha Higareda), drill-toting lunatic The Surgeon (Vinnie Jones) and masked assassin Lazlo Soot (Tommy Flanagan) -- are in hot pursuit of agent Weed. Now Weed's only hope for survival lies in the hands of FBI agent Zane Baker (Clayne Crawford).

programme.title: De vuelta en El Strip (2023)
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, Merlin moves to Las Vegas to pursue work as a magician, only to get hired as the frontman in a revival of the notorious Black male stripper crew, the Chocolate Chips. Led by Luther -- now broke and broken -- the old, domesticated, out-of-shape Chips put aside former conflicts and reunite to save the hotel they used to perform in while helping Merlin win back his girl.

programme.title: Vida perra (2021)
programme.desc: Abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, a naive but lovable dog named Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier and his gang of strays. Determined to seek revenge, Reggie and his new canine pals embark on an epic adventure to get him home and make Doug pay for his dirty deed.

programme.title: Una sociedad educada (2023)
programme.desc: Martial artist-in-training Ria Khan believes she must save her older sister Lena from her impending marriage. After enlisting the help of her friends, Ria attempts to pull off the most ambitious of all wedding heists in the name of independence and sisterhood.

programme.title: Supersalidos (2007)
programme.desc: High school seniors Seth and Evan have high hopes for a graduation party. The co-dependent teens plan to score booze and babes so they can become part of the in-crowd, but separation anxiety and two bored police officers complicate the pair's self-proclaimed mission.

programme.title: De vuelta en El Strip (2023)

programme.title: Los que se quedan (2023)
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school remains on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go. He soon forms an unlikely bond with a brainy but damaged troublemaker, and with the school's head cook, a woman who just lost a son in the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Los que se quedan (2023)

He soon forms an unlikely bond with a brainy but damaged troublemaker, and with the school's head cook, a woman who just lost a son in the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Una sociedad educada (2023)
programme.desc: Martial artist-in-training Ria Khan believes she must save her older sister Lena from her impending marriage. After enlisting the help of her friends, Ria attempts to pull off the most ambitious of all wedding heists in the name of independence and sisterhood.

programme.title: Half Magic (2018)
programme.desc: Three women utilize their newly formed sisterhood to battle sexism, bad relationships and low self-esteem. They soon find the secret to ultimate fulfillment by embracing their wild adventures.

programme.title: Los 50 (2023)
programme.desc: Adam Lerner has always tried to take good care of his health, so it comes as a cruel surprise when he learns that he has malignant tumors along his spine. His doctor gives him a 50/50 chance of survival, but Adam tries to remain upbeat, though his mother and his friend Kyle, react badly to the news. Adam starts seeing a therapist, but their relationship threatens to cross the boundary between doctor and patient.

programme.title: 50 sombras muy oscuras (2016)
programme.desc: In a spoof of "Fifty Shades of Grey," Hannah Steele interviews entrepreneur Christian Black (Marlon Wayans) for her roommate's school newspaper. The wealthy and eligible Black quickly learns how clumsy the young woman is. As flirtation leads to attraction, Christian invites Hannah to his home and introduces her to his kinky world of S&M. Despite their different backgrounds, the new couple consistently surprise each other with how far they're willing to go to make their relationship work.

programme.title: Pelotas en juego (2007)
programme.desc: A hard fall from grace strips Randy Daytona (Dan Fogler) of being considered a pingpong phenomenon. Now he must bounce back to take on an undercover assignment for the government. The FBI wants him to enter a tournament sponsored by Feng (Christopher Walken), a ping-pong enthusiast and notorious criminal. Randy must get the goods on Feng and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Transamerican Love Story (2008)
programme.desc: Right in the midst of important changes in her life, Bree Osborne (Felicity Huffman) learns that she fathered a son, Toby (Kevin Zegers), 17 years ago. Bailing him out of jail in New York, Bree poses as a Christian missionary. She plans to take Toby to his stepfather's house, but when she learns that the stepfather sexually abused the boy, Bree brings her son back to Los Angeles with her. As Toby begins to fall for Bree, she must find a way to reveal who she really is.

programme.title: NHK WORLD PRIME (2017)
programme.desc: Rafi Gardet (Uma Thurman) is a 37-year-old divorced Catholic businesswoman falling for David (Bryan Greenberg), a 23-year-old Jewish artist. With the help of her therapist, Dr. Lisa Metzger (Meryl Streep), Rafi tries to overcome her insecurities and accept the age difference between her and David. But when Lisa learns more about her client's new love, she realizes that David is her son. As Lisa tries to separate the couple, Rafi and David fear that they may not be right for each other after all.

programme.title: Someone Marry Barry (2014)
programme.desc: Friends try to find a wife for their obnoxious buddy (Tyler Labine), but their plan backfires when his new girlfriend (Lucy Punch) turns out to be just as socially inappropriate.

programme.title: Pelotas en juego (2007)
programme.desc: A hard fall from grace strips Randy Daytona (Dan Fogler) of being considered a pingpong phenomenon. Now he must bounce back to take on an undercover assignment for the government. The FBI wants him to enter a tournament sponsored by Feng (Christopher Walken), a ping-pong enthusiast and notorious criminal. Randy must get the goods on Feng and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Buscando un amigo para el fin del mundo (2012)
programme.desc: The announcement that an enormous asteroid will obliterate Earth in less than a month brings an end to the marriage of mild-mannered insurance salesman Dodge (Steve Carell), whose wife leaves him on the spot. After his bold young neighbor, Penny (Keira Knightley), belatedly delivers a letter from Dodge's former sweetheart, Dodge decides that he must find the love of his life before it's too late. Dodge and Penny embark on a road trip that eventually brightens their outlook, if not the world's.

programme.title: 50 sombras muy oscuras (2016)
programme.desc: In a spoof of "Fifty Shades of Grey," Hannah Steele interviews entrepreneur Christian Black (Marlon Wayans) for her roommate's school newspaper. The wealthy and eligible Black quickly learns how clumsy the young woman is. As flirtation leads to attraction, Christian invites Hannah to his home and introduces her to his kinky world of S&M. Despite their different backgrounds, the new couple consistently surprise each other with how far they're willing to go to make their relationship work.

programme.title: Permíteme presentártela [Let Me Introduce Her] (2018)
programme.desc: Bullied at school, neglected at home and incredibly lonely, 12-year-old Owen (Kodi Smit-McPhee) spends his days plotting revenge on his tormentors and spends his nights spying on other residents of the apartment complex. His sole friend is Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz), a strange girl who comes out only at nighttime. Both outcasts, the two form a strong bond. When Abby's caretaker disappears amid a series of gruesome murders, Owen begins to suspect that she is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Vaya resaca (2014)
programme.desc: Meghan (Elizabeth Banks) is an aspiring news anchor in the cutthroat world of Los Angeles television. After an audition for her dream job ends in failure, she goes out for an uncharacteristic night of partying. The next morning, she awakes in a stranger's bed and hears a phone message from her agent telling her the job is hers if she can make it across town by 5:00 pm. Stranded in an unknown area without money, phone or transportation, she races to the most important interview of her life.

programme.title: Magic City: An American Fantasy (2025)
programme.desc: With Mr. Magic in prison, the schemers played, Magic City spiraled into lawlessness as DJs, bartenders, and dancers ran their own side hustles, each believing they were bigger than the club.

programme.title: Caza en la noche (2019)
programme.desc: An Interpol agent must battle a ruthless crime boss and his mercenaries at an Italian villa in order to save his wife and daughter.

programme.title: BASEketball - muchas pelotas en juego (1998)
programme.desc: When slacker friends Joe Cooper (Trey Parker) and Doug Remer (Matt Stone) are challenged to a pickup basketball game against some jocks, they counter by proposing to play a game they learned called BASEketball, which combines basketball and baseball. In reality, they are improvising all of the rules, but somehow the sport becomes a hit. A promoter (Ernest Borgnine) forms a popular league, but after his death a rival owner (Robert Vaughn) wants to change the rules to increase profits.

programme.title: El ministerio de la Guerra Sucia (2024)
programme.desc: British Prime Minister Winston Churchill and a group of military officials hatch a daring plan to neutralize Hitler's fleet of German U-boats during World War II. Made up of a motley crew of rogues and mavericks, the top-secret combat unit uses unconventional techniques to battle the Nazis and change the course of the war.

programme.title: The Law and Mr. Jones (1960)
programme.desc: Two filmmakers (Sarah Jones, Jon Foster) discover too late that it was a bad idea to make a documentary about their neighbor (Mark Steger), a reclusive artist.

programme.title: Half Magic (2018)
programme.desc: Three women utilize their newly formed sisterhood to battle sexism, bad relationships and low self-esteem. They soon find the secret to ultimate fulfillment by embracing their wild adventures.

programme.title: Caza en la noche (2019)
programme.desc: An Interpol agent must battle a ruthless crime boss and his mercenaries at an Italian villa in order to save his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Ellen and Brian attend Beltane, a festival to celebrate the coming of summer, where sins are burned away by the needfire; Henry struggles to hold onto his hope and Julia loses allies when secrets come out.

programme.title: Magic City: An American Fantasy (2025)
programme.desc: With Mr. Magic in prison, the schemers played, Magic City spiraled into lawlessness as DJs, bartenders, and dancers ran their own side hustles, each believing they were bigger than the club.

programme.title: Manhattan nocturno (2016)
programme.desc: A seductive woman (Yvonne Strahovski) recruits a New York tabloid writer (Adrien Brody) to investigate the murder of her husband (Campbell Scott).

programme.title: BASEketball - muchas pelotas en juego (1998)
programme.desc: When slacker friends Joe Cooper (Trey Parker) and Doug Remer (Matt Stone) are challenged to a pickup basketball game against some jocks, they counter by proposing to play a game they learned called BASEketball, which combines basketball and baseball. After his bold young neighbor, Penny (Keira Knightley), belatedly delivers a letter from Dodge's former sweetheart, Dodge decides that he must find the love of his life before it's too late. Dodge and Penny embark on a road trip that eventually brightens their outlook, if not the world's.

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Ellen and Brian attend Beltane, a festival to celebrate the coming of summer, where sins are burned away by the needfire; Henry struggles to hold onto his hope and Julia loses allies when secrets come out.

Made up of a motley crew of rogues and mavericks, the top-secret combat unit uses unconventional techniques to battle the Nazis and change the course of the war.

programme.title: El juramento (2020)
programme.desc: Paige and Leo are happily married newlyweds, but their idyllic life together suddenly shatters when a car accident leaves her in a coma. When Paige awakes, she has severe memory loss and doesn't know Leo. She also has a confusing relationship with her parents and still harbors feelings for a former fiance. Despite these difficult obstacles, Leo is determined to renew their bond and rebuild their marriage.

programme.title: Buscando un amigo para el fin del mundo (2012)
programme.desc: The announcement that an enormous asteroid will obliterate Earth in less than a month brings an end to the marriage of mild-mannered insurance salesman Dodge (Steve Carell), whose wife leaves him on the spot. After his bold young neighbor, Penny (Keira Knightley), belatedly delivers a letter from Dodge's former sweetheart, Dodge decides that he must find the love of his life before it's too late. Dodge and Penny embark on a road trip that eventually brightens their outlook, if not the world's.

programme.title: Las aventuras de Sherlock Holmes y el Dr. Watson (1980)
programme.desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and Dr. John Watson join forces to investigate a mysterious murder at Buckingham Palace. It seems like an open-and-shut case as all signs point to Professor James Moriarty, the criminal mastermind and longtime nemesis of the crime-solving duo. When new twists and clues begin to emerge, the world's greatest sleuth and his trusted assistant must now use their legendary wits and ingenious methods to catch the killer before the queen becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Iolo's Borderlands (2023)
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: Baño de Sangre (2024)
programme.desc: A manipulative contractor terrorizes a housewife. A twisted battle of wits with deliciously unexpected results.

programme.title: Someone Marry Barry (2014)
programme.desc: Friends try to find a wife for their obnoxious buddy (Tyler Labine), but their plan backfires when his new girlfriend (Lucy Punch) turns out to be just as socially inappropriate.

programme.title: Fiasco total: Woodstock 99 (2022)
programme.desc: Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: ¿Por qué me casé también? (2010)
programme.desc: In the Bahamas for their annual reunion, four couples are eager to share news about their lives over the past year. But when one's ex-husband arrives to break up her marriage and win her back, the others realize they are not immune to the challenges of love and fidelity.

programme.title: Iolo's Borderlands (2023)
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: Amenaza en el aire (2025)
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Baño de Sangre (2024)
programme.desc: A manipulative contractor terrorizes a housewife. A twisted battle of wits with deliciously unexpected results.

programme.title: Las aventuras de Sherlock Holmes y el Dr. Watson (1980)

Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: Magic City: An American Fantasy (2025)
programme.desc: The notorious Black Mafia Family drug cartel sets up shop in Magic City; thus begins the "Make It Rain" era of the club, promising more money (and violence) than ever before.

programme.title: ¿Por qué me casé también? (2010)
programme.desc: In the Bahamas for their annual reunion, four couples are eager to share news about their lives over the past year. But when one's ex-husband arrives to break up her marriage and win her back, the others realize they are not immune to the challenges of love and fidelity.

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: A League of Their Own (2010)
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

programme.title: Hombres de Negro: La serie animada (1997)
programme.desc: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

programme.title: Mandela, del mito al hombre (2013)
programme.desc: The remarkable life of South African revolutionary, president and world icon Nelson Mandela (Idris Elba) takes center stage. Though he had humble beginnings as a herd boy in a rural village, Mandela became involved in the anti-apartheid movement and co-founded the African National Congress Youth League. His activities eventually led to his imprisonment on Robben Island from 1964 to 1990. In 1994, Mandela became the first president of democratic South Africa.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Why Did I Get Married - The Play (2006)
programme.desc: Eight married friends take their annual reunion vacation in the Colorado mountains. Revelations of infidelity involving one pair shatter the amicable mood, forcing the remaining friends to take a hard look at the strength of their own marriages. The couples grapple with issues of commitment, love, betrayal and forgiveness as they try to move on with their lives.

programme.title: A League of Their Own (2010)
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely. His luck runs out when a disastrous mechanical malfunction sends his plane hurtling toward the ground. Whip pulls off a miraculous crash-landing that results in only six lives lost. Shaken to the core, Whip vows to get sober -- but when the crash investigation exposes his addiction, he finds himself in an even worse situation.

programme.title: Hombres de Negro: La serie animada (1997)
programme.desc: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

programme.title: Magic City: An American Fantasy (2025)
programme.desc: The notorious Black Mafia Family drug cartel sets up shop in Magic City; thus begins the "Make It Rain" era of the club, promising more money (and violence) than ever before.

programme.title: Ases calientes 2: Baile de asesinos (2010)
programme.desc: Lowly FBI clerk Walter Weed (Tom Berenger) unwittingly becomes the target of assassins when gangland kingpin Hal Leuco places a bounty on his life. Responding to the call, a motley assortment of hit men -- including poisons expert Ariella Martinez (Martha Higareda), drill-toting lunatic The Surgeon (Vinnie Jones) and masked assassin Lazlo Soot (Tommy Flanagan) -- are in hot pursuit of agent Weed. Now Weed's only hope for survival lies in the hands of FBI agent Zane Baker (Clayne Crawford).

programme.title: Outlander: Sangre de mi sangre (2025)
programme.desc: Henry continues to look for Julia until a new discovery threatens to end his search.

programme.title: The Big Leap: El gran salto (2021)
programme.desc: When Evelyn Salt (Angelina Jolie) became a CIA officer, she swore an oath to duty, honor and country. But, when a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy, Salt's oath is put to the test. Now a fugitive, Salt must use every skill gained from years of training and experience to evade capture, but the more she tries to prove her innocence, the more guilty she seems.

programme.title: Red Eyes: Kanshi Sosahan (2021)
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandmother's funeral, hotel manager Lisa Reisert (Rachel McAdams) is waiting to fly back home when she meets charming Jackson Rippner (Cillian Murphy) at check-in. She thinks it luck that they're seated together on the plane, but soon learns otherwise. Jackson hopes to assassinate the head of Homeland Security, but to do so, he needs Lisa to reassign the official's room number at her hotel. As insurance, Jackson has kidnapped Lisa's father (Brian Cox).

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely. His luck runs out when a disastrous mechanical malfunction sends his plane hurtling toward the ground. Whip pulls off a miraculous crash-landing that results in only six lives lost. Shaken to the core, Whip vows to get sober -- but when the crash investigation exposes his addiction, he finds himself in an even worse situation.

programme.title: King of Survival (2024)
programme.desc: After her parents are brutally murdered in a home invasion, a young woman (Sofia Black-D'Elia) learns that her real father is a ruthless warlord who now wants her back.

programme.title: Pregunta lo que quieras (2014)
programme.desc: A young woman (Britt Robertson) chronicles her sexual adventures in an anonymous blog that exposes her innermost desires, shames and secrets.

programme.title: A Thousand and One Nights (2015)
programme.desc: Unapologetic and free-spirited Inez kidnaps her 6-year-old son, Terry, from the foster care system. They set out to reclaim their sense of home, identity and stability in a rapidly changing New York City.

programme.title: Jack Whitehall: Training Days (2018)
programme.desc: Police drama about a veteran officer who escorts a rookie on his first day with the LAPD's tough inner-city narcotics unit. "Training Day" is a blistering action drama that asks the audience to decide what is necessary, what is heroic and what crosses the line in the harrowing gray zone of fighting urban crime. Does law-abiding law enforcement come at the expense of justice and public safety? If so, do we demand safe streets at any cost?

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at Sea (2024)
programme.desc: A former special forces agent's son is kidnapped and must now wipe out three dangerous crime syndicates, if he wants to see his son alive again.

programme.title: Catch Hell (2014)
programme.desc: While on location in Louisiana, an actor (Ryan Phillippe) is kidnapped by two men who are connected to his past and have a twisted fate in store for him.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Bienvenidos a Raccoon City (2021)
programme.desc: Welcome to Raccoon City, once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corp. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland, a dying town with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Red Eyes: Kanshi Sosahan (2021)
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandmother's funeral, hotel manager Lisa Reisert (Rachel McAdams) is waiting to fly back home when she meets charming Jackson Rippner (Cillian Murphy) at check-in. She thinks it luck that they're seated together on the plane, but soon learns otherwise. Jackson hopes to assassinate the head of Homeland Security, but to do so, he needs Lisa to reassign the official's room number at her hotel. As insurance, Jackson has kidnapped Lisa's father (Brian Cox).

programme.title: Elysium (2013)
programme.desc: In 2154, the wealthy live in comfort and luxury aboard a space station, while the poor have a hardscrabble existence on the overpopulated and ruined Earth.

programme.title: Pregunta lo que quieras (2014)
programme.desc: A young woman (Britt Robertson) chronicles her sexual adventures in an anonymous blog that exposes her innermost desires, shames and secrets.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Bienvenidos a Raccoon City (2021)
programme.desc: Welcome to Raccoon City, once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corp. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland, a dying town with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Camino a Paloma (2014)
programme.desc: After avenging the rape and murder of his mother, a man (Jason Momoa) dodges the FBI while traveling across the West to spread her ashes.

programme.title: Conan, el bárbaro (1982)
programme.desc: A powerful Cimmerian warrior, Conan (Jason Momoa) carves a bloody path across the land of Hyboria on a personal vendetta. That soon turns into a an epic battle against evil, for Conan's mortal enemy, Khalar Zym (Stephen Lang), seeks the legendary Mask of Acheron. The artifact will enable Khalar Zym to raise his wife from the dead and achieve immortality for himself, but it will also unleash a malevolent force upon the land, and only Conan and his companions can stop it.

programme.title: Estado crítico (2015)
programme.desc: A former black-ops agent (Jean-Claude Van Damme) begins a blood-soaked quest to find the organ thieves who stole his kidney before he could donate it to his dying niece.

programme.title: El efecto sombra (2017)
programme.desc: A doctor (Jonathan Rhys Meyers) tries to help a young man (Cam Gigandet) whose violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

programme.title: Outcast (2016)
programme.desc: A fugitive Chinese prince and his sister enlist the aid of two war-weary Crusaders (Nicolas Cage, Hayden Christensen) to help them defeat their older brother, who murdered their father and seized the throne.

programme.title: Sleepless (2018)
programme.desc: Undercover Las Vegas police officer Vincent Downs (Jamie Foxx) finds himself caught in a high-stakes web of corrupt cops, internal affairs and murderous gangsters. When a failed heist leads to the kidnapping of his teenage son (Octavius J. Johnson), Downs must race against time during a wild and restless night to save him and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: After the Fall (2014)
programme.desc: After losing his job, an insurance adjuster (Wes Bentley) throws morality to the wind and turns to a life of crime to support his family.

programme.title: Camino a Paloma (2014)
programme.desc: After avenging the rape and murder of his mother, a man (Jason Momoa) dodges the FBI while traveling across the West to spread her ashes.

programme.title: El último asalto (2017)
programme.desc: A former boxing champion, long past his prime, returns to his childhood boxing club. He reunites with his old corner man and promoter, hoping the team can teach him to stand tall once more.

programme.title: Coriolanus (1979)
programme.desc: Caius Martius, aka Coriolanus (Ralph Fiennes), is an arrogant and fearsome general who has built a career on protecting Rome from its enemies. Pushed by his ambitious mother (Vanessa Redgrave) to seek the position of consul, Coriolanus is at odds with the masses and unpopular with certain colleagues (James Nesbitt, Paul Jesson). When a riot results in his expulsion from Rome, Coriolanus seeks out his sworn enemy, Tullus Aufidius (Gerard Butler). Together, the pair vow to destroy the great city.

programme.title: Sore Snow Man ni Yarasete kudasai (2020)
programme.desc: Mia goes snowboarding with her fiancé Max in a remote area of Georgia. When Max disappears without a trace, Mia battles the elements and a dangerous masked snowmobile rider who is out for blood.

programme.title: Sleepless (2018)
programme.desc: Undercover Las Vegas police officer Vincent Downs (Jamie Foxx) finds himself caught in a high-stakes web of corrupt cops, internal affairs and murderous gangsters. When a failed heist leads to the kidnapping of his teenage son (Octavius J. Johnson), Downs must race against time during a wild and restless night to save him and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Entre Rejas (2005)
programme.desc: A former Texas Ranger with a checkered past is forced to take action when a ruthless biker gang rolls into town looking to cause trouble.

programme.title: Venom: habrá matanza (2021)
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Sleepless (2018)
programme.desc: Undercover Las Vegas police officer Vincent Downs (Jamie Foxx) finds himself caught in a high-stakes web of corrupt cops, internal affairs and murderous gangsters. When a failed heist leads to the kidnapping of his teenage son (Octavius J. Johnson), Downs must race against time during a wild and restless night to save him and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: My Pack Life (2022)
programme.desc: Asher is a former Mossad agent turned gun-for-hire, living an austere life in an ever-changing Brooklyn. Approaching the end of his career, he breaks the oath he took as a young man when he meets Sophie on a hit gone wrong. In order to have love in his life before it's too late, he must kill the man he was, for a chance at becoming the man he wants to be.

programme.title: Venom: habrá matanza (2021)
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: El hombre de los puños de hierro (2012)
programme.desc: In 19th-century China, a stranger (RZA) settles in a jungle village and becomes its blacksmith. Radical tribal factions force him to fashion elaborate tools of destruction, and the clans' conflict soon erupts into a full war. Knowing he must take action, the blacksmith channels an ancient energy to transform himself into a human weapon. Fighting beside iconic heroes, the blacksmith harnesses this incredible power to defend his adopted people from an army of soulless villains.

programme.title: El hombre de los puños de hierro 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A miner finds Thaddeus after he is badly wounded and offers him refuge. As he heals, he becomes involved in a conflict between the townspeople and their evil master.

programme.title: My Pack Life (2022)

programme.title: The Legend of King Arthur (1979)
programme.desc: Desperate for one last chance to win, Michael Light convinces a sponsor to back him and a team of athletes for the Adventure Racing World Championship in the Dominican Republic. As the team gets pushed to the outer limits of endurance, a dog named Arthur comes along for the ride, redefining what victory, loyalty and friendship truly means.

programme.title: People Do The Craziest Things
programme.desc: Anarchy reigns when an unknown toxin turns the peaceful citizens of Ogden Marsh into bloodthirsty lunatics. In an effort to contain the spread of the infection, authorities blockade the town and use deadly force to keep anyone from getting in or out. Now trapped among killers, Sheriff Dutten (Timothy Olyphant) and his wife (Radha Mitchell) and two companions must band together to find a way out before madness and death overtake them.

programme.title: Matar al irlandés (2011)
programme.desc: Mobster Danny Greene (Ray Stevenson) ignites a turf war in 1970s Cleveland that leads to the collapse of the Mafia in several major U.S. cities.

programme.title: Oso vicioso (2023)
programme.desc: An oddball group of cops, criminals, tourists and teens converges in a Georgia forest after a 500-pound black bear ingests a large amount of cocaine and goes on a drug-fueled rampage.

programme.title: Pandorum (2009)
programme.desc: Astronauts Payton (Dennis Quaid) and Bower (Ben Foster) awake in a hypersleep chamber with no memory of who they are or what their mission might be. While Payton stays behind to monitor the radio transmitter, Bower ventures out of the chamber into the seemingly abandoned spaceship. The men quickly realize that they are not alone and that the fate of mankind hinges on what they do next.

programme.title: The Legend of King Arthur (1979)

programme.desc: A fugitive Chinese prince and his sister enlist the aid of two war-weary Crusaders (Nicolas Cage, Hayden Christensen) to help them defeat their older brother, who murdered their father and seized the throne.

programme.title: El vuelo del ángel negro (1991)
programme.desc: A mentally disturbed Air Force pilot, Capt. Eddie Gordon (William O'Leary), murders his parents and brother, then commandeers a plane that is armed with a nuclear missile. Gordon, who is also a religious zealot, takes to the air and intends to destroy Las Vegas, which he feels deserves to be punished. Gordon's superior officer and squad leader, Col. Matt Ryan (Peter Strauss), goes in pursuit, and hopes to intercept him before he can follow through on his mad scheme.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath (2020)
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family.

programme.title: Amar para morir (2021)
programme.desc: A man and his old flame cross paths with an assortment of schemers and killers.

programme.title: Bestia de carga (2018)
programme.desc: Pilot Sean Haggerty must deliver a shipment of cocaine across the U.S.-Mexican border for his final run as a drug smuggler. Alone in a small plane, he's faced with the burden of his allegiance to the cartel, his deal with the Drug Enforcement Administration and his increasingly tense relationship with his wife.

programme.title: The Last Warrior. Heritage (2024)
programme.desc: A man (Dolph Lundgren) leads earthquake survivors against a gang of violent convicts bent on ruling the world.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath (2020)
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family.

programme.title: The Big Leap: El gran salto (2021)
programme.desc: When Evelyn Salt (Angelina Jolie) became a CIA officer, she swore an oath to duty, honor and country. But, when a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy, Salt's oath is put to the test. Now a fugitive, Salt must use every skill gained from years of training and experience to evade capture, but the more she tries to prove her innocence, the more guilty she seems.

programme.title: Traficantes por error (Next Day Air) (2009)
programme.desc: Delivery man Leo Jackson (Donald Faison) is definitely on the wrong road to success. He still lives at home, he and his girlfriend just broke up, and he has multiple complaints stacked against him at work. Fortunately, Leo has plenty of marijuana to keep his mind off his troubles. But when he accidentally delivers a box of cocaine to the wrong address, Leo finds himself in the middle of a bad deal that may just cost him his life.

programme.title: The Last Warrior. Heritage (2024)
programme.desc: A man (Dolph Lundgren) leads earthquake survivors against a gang of violent convicts bent on ruling the world.

programme.title: Máxima velocidad (2014)
programme.desc: When two small-town rival racers are forced to work together to defeat a reigning champion, it becomes survival of the fastest in an ultimate race to the finish line.

programme.title: The Oath (2018)
programme.desc: In 400 A.D., in a forgotten time in ancient America, a lone Hebraic fugitive must preserve the history of his fallen nation while being hunted by a ruthless tyrant.

programme.title: Lawless (2004)
programme.desc: In 1931, the Bondurant brothers of Franklin County, Va., run a multipurpose backwoods establishment that hides their true business, bootlegging. Middle brother Forrest (Tom Hardy) is the brain of the operation; older Howard (Jason Clarke) is the brawn, and younger Jack (Shia LaBeouf), the lookout. Though the local police have taken bribes and left the brothers alone, a violent war erupts when a sadistic lawman (Guy Pearce) from Chicago arrives and tries to shut down the Bondurants operation.

programme.title: Escape Room 2: Mueres por salir (2021)
programme.desc: Six people unwittingly find themselves locked in another series of escape rooms, slowly uncovering what they have in common to survive -- and discovering they've all played the game before.

programme.title: Nekrotronic (2018)
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a part of a secret sect of magical demon hunters called the Nekromancers.

programme.title: Querido David (2023)
programme.desc: After responding to Internet trolls, a man becomes haunted by the ghost of a dead child named David. Based on the viral Twitter thread by BuzzFeed comic artist Adam Ellis.

programme.title: Naked Marriage Afterwards (2014)
programme.desc: A doctor tells Nathan he senses that the man is about to die.

programme.title: Snowden on Ice
programme.desc: Disillusioned with the intelligence community, top contractor Edward Snowden (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) leaves his job at the National Security Agency. He now knows that a virtual mountain of data is being assembled to track all forms of digital communication -- not just from foreign governments and terrorist groups, but from ordinary Americans. When Snowden decides to leak this classified information, he becomes a traitor to some, a hero to others and a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Secuestrada (2011)
programme.desc: A bank robber (Stephen Dorff) commandeers a car occupied by a woman (Maria Bello) and her 5-year-old son (Connor Hill).

programme.title: Ava's Possessions (2015)
programme.desc: After an exorcism frees her soul, a young woman (Louisa Krause) attends Spirit Possession Anonymous and meets a fellow victim (Whitney Able) who wants her demon back.

programme.title: Five Nights of Love (2015)
programme.desc: A troubled security guard begins working at Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. While spending his first night on the job, he realizes the late shift at Freddy's won't be so easy to make it through.

programme.title: The Bugs Bunny and Tweety Show (1986)
programme.desc: At a rundown desert motel, Agnes (Ashley Judd) begins a tentative relationship with a newcomer named Peter (Michael Shannon). He has a strange charisma, one that offers fearful and unstable Agnes a flicker of hope. When Peter reveals that the military deliberately infected him with a bug and that he has tiny insects crawling under his skin, paranoia begins to envelop the desperate pair.

programme.title: Silent Night, Holy Night
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a man witnesses the death of his young son when the boy gets caught in crossfire between warring gangs. Recovering from a wound that cost him his voice, he soon embarks on a bloody and grueling quest to punish those responsible.

programme.title: The Bugs Bunny and Tweety Show (1986)
programme.desc: At a rundown desert motel, Agnes (Ashley Judd) begins a tentative relationship with a newcomer named Peter (Michael Shannon). programme.title: Frankenstein Jr. (1966)
programme.desc: In this re-imagining of Mary Shelley's classic, Dr. Frankenstein is Dr. Victor Helios (Thomas Kretschmann), who has found the means to prolong his life into the present. Portrayed as the villain, Helios has amassed a collection of monsters that are killing people in New Orleans. Detectives Carson O'Connor (Parker Posey) and Michael Sloane (Adam Goldberg) team with the doctor's first creation, Deucalion (Vincent Perez), to track down and stop the crazed evil scientist.

programme.title: Jack Goes Home (2016)
programme.desc: After his father dies in a car crash, a man (Rory Culkin) returns home to care for his injured mother and slowly begins to question his own childhood memories.

programme.title: Big Sky (2020)
programme.desc: Two masked gunmen attack a woman and her agoraphobic daughter as they travel by van to a treatment facility.

programme.title: El internado: Las Cumbres (2021)
programme.desc: Jacob Felsen experiences every kid's worst nightmare -- attending boarding school at a creepy old mansion with six teenage misfits and two menacing teachers. He must soon confront all of his fears as events become increasingly sinister and horrific.

programme.title: The Big Leap: El gran salto (2021)
programme.desc: When Evelyn Salt (Angelina Jolie) became a CIA officer, she swore an oath to duty, honor and country. But, when a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy, Salt's oath is put to the test. Now a fugitive, Salt must use every skill gained from years of training and experience to evade capture, but the more she tries to prove her innocence, the more guilty she seems.

programme.desc: Pete Koslow is a former special operations soldier working as an informant for the FBI to help dismantle the Polish mafia's drug trade in New York. But when the FBI's operation goes wrong, resulting in the death of an undercover NYPD cop, Pete is coerced into returning to Bale Hill, the prison he previously served time in for manslaughter, to take down the cartel from the inside.

programme.title: Expediente Warren: El último rito (2025)
programme.desc: Suffering from sleep paralysis, a medical student falls prey to a demonic force that wants to rip her apart from within. Torn between sanity and the unknown, she's left with no alternative but to contact a local priest for help.

programme.title: El internado: Las Cumbres (2021)

However, when the killers who come after him also target his ex-girlfriend, he must fend off an army of assassins and win back the love of his life before it's too late.

programme.desc: Two masked gunmen attack a woman and her agoraphobic daughter as they travel by van to a treatment facility.

programme.desc: Still reeling from the loss of her mother, medical student Nancy Adams (Blake Lively) travels to a secluded beach for some much-needed solace. Despite the danger of surfing alone, Nancy decides to soak up the sun and hit the waves. Suddenly, a great white shark attacks, forcing her to swim to a giant rock for safety. Left injured and stranded 200 yards from shore, the frightened young woman must fight for her life as the deadly predator circles her in its feeding ground.

programme.title: Metamorphosis: The Alien Factor (1990)
programme.desc: A computer-wise teen (Tara Leigh) and her valley-girl friend (Dianna Flaherty) take on a mutant-tissue monster at a lab.

programme.title: Los forajidos de Baytown (2012)
programme.desc: Three infamous brothers from Alabama stir up a whole lot of trouble with crooked cops, mobsters and more when they try to accomplish a single good deed.

programme.title: Psych:9 (2010)
programme.desc: Disturbing events at a mysterious hospital may uncover the truth behind a series of murders.

programme.title: Removals (2001)
programme.desc: Ghastly hallucinations haunt a carpet cleaner at a mansion where a murder may have occurred.

programme.title: Mansión Foster para amigos imaginarios (2004)
programme.desc: When Jessica moves back into her childhood home with her family, her youngest stepdaughter, Alice, finds a stuffed bear named Chauncey. As Alice's behavior becomes more and more concerning, Jessica intervenes only to realize that Chauncey is much more than the stuffed toy bear she believed him to be.

programme.title: TOXIC (2023)
programme.desc: A beautiful mental patient embarks on a killing spree after she learns about a bounty on her head.

programme.title: Resident Evil (2022)
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game, Milla Jovovich and Michelle Rodriguez star as the leaders of a commando team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth.

programme.title: Head Count (2019)
programme.desc: After escaping prison, Kat's own revolver is pointed to his head by an unknown assailant. As the empty rounds click away, he tries to remember what happened to each bullet.

programme.title: The Law and Mr. Jones (1960)
programme.desc: Two filmmakers (Sarah Jones, Jon Foster) discover too late that it was a bad idea to make a documentary about their neighbor (Mark Steger), a reclusive artist.

programme.title: Among The Shadows (2014)
programme.desc: A Brussels private detective who comes from a long line of werewolves uses her innate instincts to unravel the conspiracy behind her uncle's murder.

programme.desc: Three infamous brothers from Alabama stir up a whole lot of trouble with crooked cops, mobsters and more when they try to accomplish a single good deed.

programme.title: Resident Evil (2022)
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game, Milla Jovovich and Michelle Rodriguez star as the leaders of a commando team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth.

programme.title: Mansión Foster para amigos imaginarios (2004)
programme.desc: When Jessica moves back into her childhood home with her family, her youngest stepdaughter, Alice, finds a stuffed bear named Chauncey. As Alice's behavior becomes more and more concerning, Jessica intervenes only to realize that Chauncey is much more than the stuffed toy bear she believed him to be.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath (2020)
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family.

programme.title: El efecto sombra (2017)
programme.desc: A doctor (Jonathan Rhys Meyers) tries to help a young man (Cam Gigandet) whose violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

programme.title: Fuga de Pretoria (2020)
programme.desc: Sentenced to a South African prison for 12 years, anti-apartheid activist Tim Jenkin and his fellow inmates devise a daring plan to escape.

programme.title: Welcome to Acapulco (2019)
programme.desc: A video game designer finds himself on the run from powerful criminals, deadly hit men and federal agents in Acapulco, Mexico.

programme.title: Sore Snow Man ni Yarasete kudasai (2020)
programme.desc: Mia goes snowboarding with her fiancé Max in a remote area of Georgia. When Max disappears without a trace, Mia battles the elements and a dangerous masked snowmobile rider who is out for blood.

programme.title: Evolver (2004)
programme.desc: Accidents happen after a young video-game whiz (Ethan Randall) gets a dueling robot from a virtual-reality game.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends (1972)
programme.desc: Melinda is a lonely and unstable gas-station attendant who's tired of being overshadowed by her more confident and outgoing co-worker. When a robber holds up the station at gunpoint, Melinda tries to make a connection with the desperate thief.

programme.title: El efecto sombra (2017)
programme.desc: A doctor (Jonathan Rhys Meyers) tries to help a young man (Cam Gigandet) whose violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

programme.title: The House Next Door: Meet the Blacks 2 (2021)
programme.desc: After surviving a night of terror on the West Coast, author Carl Black moves his family back to his childhood home in Chicago. His quest to find peace and quiet takes an unexpected turn when he meets the eccentric new homeowner next door. Convinced that the man is a vampire, Carl and his oddball neighbors join forces to save themselves from the bloodsucking undead.

programme.title: Played (2013)
programme.desc: Rival gangs hire a British thug (Mick Rossi), who was imprisoned for eight years, to complete a hit in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Evolver (2004)
programme.desc: Accidents happen after a young video-game whiz (Ethan Randall) gets a dueling robot from a virtual-reality game.

programme.title: Oso vicioso (2023)
programme.desc: An oddball group of cops, criminals, tourists and teens converges in a Georgia forest after a 500-pound black bear ingests a large amount of cocaine and goes on a drug-fueled rampage.

programme.title: Welcome to Acapulco (2019)
programme.desc: A video game designer finds himself on the run from powerful criminals, deadly hit men and federal agents in Acapulco, Mexico.

programme.title: Played (2013)
programme.desc: Rival gangs hire a British thug (Mick Rossi), who was imprisoned for eight years, to complete a hit in Los Angeles.

programme.title: THE Game Maker (2010)
programme.desc: Ivan's love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention.

programme.title: Bling (2021)
programme.desc: A theme park park mechanic works with robot superheroes after a villain steals his special ring.

programme.title: Bernie el Delfín (2018)
programme.desc: A brother and sister befriend a badly sunburned dolphin that has been separated from its family, uncovering a secret plan that could destroy the beach and their new friend's home.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin 2 (2019)
programme.desc: The kids are thrilled that Bernie has come back. But so has their old enemy Winston, who's about to kidnap the talented dolphin. Kevin and Holly must rescue their splashy friend before it's too late.

programme.title: Agente Secreto Simio (2022)
programme.desc: Agent Bondi James and a talking chimp embark on a dangerous mission to Wolfhound Island to stop Alpha Dog's plans for world domination.

programme.title: Dizzy & Bop's Big Adventure: The Great Music Caper (2006)
programme.desc: Two musical instruments must save their kingdom from treachery.

programme.title: Jeremy Fink and the Meaning of Life (2012)
programme.desc: Jeremy (Maxwell Beer) and his friend Lizzy (Ryan Simpkins) search all over Manhattan for the keys to a mysterious box he received.

programme.title: Thunderbirds (1965)
programme.desc: Former astronaut Jeff Tracy (Bill Paxton) runs International Rescue, a top-secret heroic organization, from his headquarters on Tracy Island. The island also houses the futuristic vehicles created by Ray "Brains" Hackenbacker (Anthony Edwards). But while Jeff is on a mission in space, his nemesis, The Hood (Ben Kingsley), invades Tracy Island. The Hood plots to use the island's technology for evil, and only Jeff's son, Alan (Brady Corbet), can stop him.

programme.title: Playmobil, la película (2019)
programme.desc: Maria and her younger brother Charlie find themselves magically transported to the fantastical world of Playmobil. While there, they encounter robots, Vikings, knights, pirates and other colorfully amusing characters. But when Charlie winds up in the clutches of an evil emperor, Maria joins forces with a bumbling secret agent and an adventurous truck driver to rescue her beloved sibling.

programme.title: Genjitsu no Yohane: Sunshine in the Mirror (2023)
programme.desc: Snow White (Lily Collins), an orphaned princess, is the rightful ruler of her kingdom, but a jealous, evil queen (Julia Roberts) schemes to gain control. When a charming prince (Armie Hammer) spurns the queen in favor of Snow White, she has the princess thrown into the woods to be devoured by a fearsome beast. Rescued by a band of diminutive highway robbers, Snow White vows to take back her realm from the treacherous queen and, with the help of her small rescuers, roars into action.

programme.title: Mayor Cupcake (2011)
programme.desc: A hard working baker is unexpectedly elected mayor of her town and relies on her street smarts to clean up the town.

programme.title: La gran seducción (2014)
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the town's full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract.

programme.title: Thunderbirds (1965)

programme.title: La gran seducción (2014)

programme.title: Orm en el reino de las nieves (2014)
programme.desc: After the trolls' victory over the Snow Queen, Orm claims that he is destined to marry the princess and inherit great power.

programme.title: Astroboy (2003)
programme.desc: In futuristic Metro City, a brilliant scientist named Tenma builds Astro Boy (Freddie Highmore), a robotic child with superstrength, X-ray vision and the ability to fly. Astro Boy sets out to explore the world and find acceptance, learning what being human is all about in the process. Finding that his friends and family in Metro City are in danger, he uses his incredible powers to save all that he loves.

programme.title: Mayor Payne (1995)
programme.desc: Maj. Benson Payne (Damon Wayans) lives, breathes and sleeps war. But after being honorably discharged from the Marines due to a lack of wars, Payne, the natural-born killer, has absolutely no idea how to cope in everyday civilian life. Fortunately, before he completely breaks down, Payne finds his way back into a military capacity at Madison Preparatory School, leading a group of misfit JROTC students who don't want to be led. Whipping these kids into shape might be his toughest battle yet.

programme.title: Agent Toby Barks (2021)
programme.desc: Two teens discover that their pet dog Toby can hack a computer, fight bad guys and talk.

programme.title: Las aventuras de Peter Pan (1989)
programme.desc: As Wendy Darling (Rachel Hurd-Wood) recounts stories to her brothers, John (Harry Newell) and Michael (Freddie Popplewell), she is visited by Peter Pan (Jeremy Sumpter). Peter, a boy who magically never ages, invites Wendy and her brothers to Neverland, an island where he lives with the Lost Boys. Once there, however, Wendy and her brothers are kidnapped by Captain Hook (Jason Isaacs). Peter, with assistance from the fairy Tink (Ludivine Sagnier), must face Hook in order to rescue the Darlings.

programme.title: Serie animada de Cazafantasmas sin título
programme.desc: Paranormal researcher Abby Yates (Melissa McCarthy) and physicist Erin Gilbert are trying to prove that ghosts exist in modern society. When strange apparitions appear in Manhattan, Gilbert and Yates turn to engineer Jillian Holtzmann for help. Also joining the team is Patty Tolan, a lifelong New Yorker who knows the city inside and out. Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, the four women prepare for an epic battle as more than 1,000 mischievous ghouls descend on Times Square.

programme.title: Cazafantasmas: Más allá (2021)
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two children move to a new town, they soon discover they have a connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.desc: Finny, a Nestrian, and his new friend Leah have must together to survive the elements and predators after they fall off Noah's Ark.

programme.title: Pororo: The Racing Adventure (2013)
programme.desc: Pororo, a curious little penguin, accidentally causes a plane to make an emergency landing in his home village. Turtles on board the plane teach the villagers how to race ice sleds, and Pororo makes it to the finals.

programme.title: Érase una vez... un cuento al revés 2 (2009)
programme.desc: Snow White (Helen Niedwick) must prevent her father from marrying a scheming witch who wants to rule the kingdom.

programme.title: Wickensburg (2022)
programme.desc: When a mother and her young son move to a small town, they soon discover the town harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: Return to Wickensburg (2024)
programme.desc: Mr. Hexenmeister has escaped from prison, and once again threatens Wickensburg. A race against time to find an ancient orb, capable of destroying the entire town, before it falls into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Go Fish (2001)
programme.desc: A parrotfish and its friends bravely confront a menace that threatens their reef home.

programme.title: Wings (1990)
programme.desc: A young aircraft fighter pilot (Josh Duhamel) trains with a flying legend in the hope that he can win a prestigious airshow competition.

programme.title: Wings: Sky Force Heroes (2014)
programme.desc: After his recklessness causes a comrade's death, a firefighter (Josh Duhamel) quits the brigade and goes to work in a coal mine.

programme.desc: A clumsy con man meets a beautiful woman who hires him to kidnap Ace, a talking and wisecracking racehorse.

programme.title: Salt (2010)
programme.desc: Después de que un desertor la acusa de espiar para los rusos, una agente de la CIA decide huir e intenta encontrar la forma de probar su inocencia.

programme.title: Colombiana (2011)
programme.desc: Una asesina profesional realiza trabajos para su tío y sueña con vengarse del criminal que asesinó a sus padres.

programme.title: A la caza de espíritus malignos (2020)
programme.desc: Un agente del tesoro persigue a un contador que trabaja para varias organizaciones criminales. Mientras más cerca de su nuca siente el peso de la justicia, el contador va tomando medidas más drásticas para mantener a salvo su doble vida y su libertad.

programme.title: Operación Swordfish (2001)
programme.desc: Un espía que trabaja para la CIA obliga a un pirata informático, quien fue liberado de prisión, a ayudar a robar fondos gubernamentales.

programme.title: Under the Volcano (2018)
programme.desc: El productor George Martin abre AIR Studios Montserrat, una instalación de grabación de última generación en una exótica isla caribeña. A la sombra de un volcán activo, el estudio atrae a algunos de los actos musicales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Cada respiro que das (2021)
programme.desc: Philip, un psiquiatra, ve su vida alterada por el suicidio de uno de sus pacientes. Cuando su hermano llega a su casa y conoce a su esposa e hija, la vida familiar y la carrera de Philip comienzan a cambiar.

programme.title: Under the Volcano (2018)

programme.title: Rita Moreno: una chica que decidió ir a por todas (2021)
programme.desc: Un vistazo a la vida y obra de Rita Moreno, desde sus humildes comienzos en Puerto Rico hasta el éxito en Broadway y Hollywood.

programme.title: Los Croods: Una nueva era (2020)
programme.desc: La familia prehistórica de los Crood enfrenta el desafío de una familia rival, los Betterman, quienes afirman estar más evolucionados.

programme.title: Mind Jumper (2021)
programme.desc: La habilidad de un joven para teletransportarse a cualquier parte del mundo lo convierte en blanco de personas que desean matarlo y de otros parecidos a él.

programme.title: De ladrón a policía (1999)
programme.desc: Un ladrón en libertad condicional se hace pasar por policía para recuperar un diamante que escondió en una estación policíaca.

programme.title: Asalto al poder (2013)
programme.desc: El policía del Capitolio John Cale debe pasar una entrevista para entrar en el Servicio Secreto. Sin saber el resultado, lleva a su hija a visitar la Casa Blanca, pero, durante el recorrido, un grupo paramilitar asalta el edificio.

programme.title: Los tiradores solitarios (2001)
programme.desc: Un exfrancotirador es obligado a volver al servicio militar y planea vengarse de sus poderosos enemigos después de ser traicionado y herido.

programme.title: Sicario (2015)
programme.desc: Kate Macer, una agente de élite del FBI, viaja a la frontera entre México y Estados Unidos para intentar capturar a un importante narcotraficante con la ayuda de otro oscuro jefe de un cártel. Durante la misión, su ética y sus valores se debilitan.

programme.title: Una joven prometedora (2020)
programme.desc: Cassie tenía un brillante futuro por delante, hasta que un acontecimiento inesperado truncó su carrera. Nada en su vida es lo que parece: es inteligente, audaz y vive una doble vida de noche. Ahora tiene la oportunidad de enmendar su pasado.

programme.title: Salt (2010)
programme.desc: Después de que un desertor la acusa de espiar para los rusos, una agente de la CIA decide huir e intenta encontrar la forma de probar su inocencia.

programme.title: La última carrera (2025)
programme.desc: El corredor keniano Eliud Kipchoge sueña con completar un maratón en menos de dos horas, un logro que se considera inalcanzable para un ser humano.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Boogie Oogie: El baile de la vida (2014)
programme.desc: Una estrella de baloncesto chino-estadounidense lucha por equilibrar las expectativas de su familia y sus propios sueños.

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls (2019)
programme.desc: Ben McGrath soñaba con convertirse en jugador profesional de béisbol, pero un accidente arruinó su carrera. Aunque la vida le da una segunda oportunidad entrenando a un equipo de sóftbol, el camino de la redención está lleno de dificultades.

programme.title: Asalto al poder (2013)
programme.desc: El policía del Capitolio John Cale debe pasar una entrevista para entrar en el Servicio Secreto. Sin saber el resultado, lleva a su hija a visitar la Casa Blanca, pero, durante el recorrido, un grupo paramilitar asalta el edificio.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Tierra de nadie (2021)
programme.desc: Hace mucho tiempo, legiones de criaturas monstruosas llamados Kaiju surgen del mar, llevando consigo una guerra. Para pelear a los Kaiju, la humanidad desarrolla robots gigantes llamados Jaegers, diseñados para ser piloteados por dos humanos. Sin embargo, ni los Jaegers son suficientes para vencer a los Kaiju, y la humanidad está al borde de la derrota. La última esperanza de la humanidad descansa en un expiloto fracasado, un aprendiz y un viejo y obsoleto Jaeger.

programme.title: Moebius Project 2012: The Veil (2021)
programme.desc: Un escritor fracasado intenta llevar a su familia a un lugar seguro, mientras que el mundo se desintegra bajo el efecto de una serie de cataclismos.

programme.title: Misión: imposible (1991)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt y su equipo intentan evitar que un exagente libere un virus mortal genéticamente modificado que, en manos equivocadas, podría causar estragos.

programme.title: Misión imposible: Protocolo fantasma (2011)
programme.desc: La FMI es implicada en un plan terrorista internacional y es cerrada. Ethan Hunt y su equipo deben trabajar de forma encubierta y esconderse para limpiar el nombre de la organización.

programme.title: Misión imposible: Nación secreta (2015)
programme.desc: El jefe de la CIA intenta disolver la IMF argumentando que es demasiado temeraria. Como resultado, Ethan Hunt y su equipo persiguen por su cuenta a una oscura y letal organización clandestina conocida como el Sindicato.

programme.title: Los tiradores solitarios (2001)
programme.desc: Un exfrancotirador es obligado a volver al servicio militar y planea vengarse de sus poderosos enemigos después de ser traicionado y herido.

programme.title: El rey escorpión: El libro de las almas (2018)
programme.desc: El rey Escorpión se une a la guerrera Tala en busca de una reliquia legendaria, el "Libro de las Almas", en cuyas páginas se oculta la forma de vencer al poderoso señor de la guerra, Nesberek.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Detrás de escena de los últimos estrenos.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set

programme.desc: Descubra el mundo apasionado y desconocido del rodaje y todos los secretos que no se muestran en la televisión.

programme.title: Cada respiro que das (2021)
programme.desc: Philip, un psiquiatra, ve su vida alterada por el suicidio de uno de sus pacientes. Cuando su hermano llega a su casa y conoce a su esposa e hija, la vida familiar y la carrera de Philip comienzan a cambiar.

programme.title: Karate Kid III. El desafío final (1989)
programme.desc: Un malvado instructor emplea sucias técnicas en la competencia, en venganza de un estudiante de karate que lo venció.

programme.title: De ladrón a policía (1999)
programme.desc: Un ladrón en libertad condicional se hace pasar por policía para recuperar un diamante que escondió en una estación policíaca.

programme.title: Dos rubias de pelo en pecho (2004)
programme.desc: Dos torpes agentes del FBI se hacen pasar por dos chicas de la alta sociedad para investigar una serie de secuestros. No obstante, mientras preparan su plan, descubren que irrumpir en la clase privilegiada es mucho más duro de lo que creían.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith (2024)
programme.desc: Un hombre y su esposa ignoran que a cada uno, como asesino internacional, se le ha asignado matar al otro.

programme.title: La vuelta al mundo en 80 días (1989)
programme.desc: Phileas Fogg es un inventor que viven en la Inglaterra victoriana. Él cree que puede viajar por todo el mundo en 80 días. Otro inventor lo reta a hacer el viaje, y él está de acuerdo. Los acompañantes en su viaje son su sirviente fiel, Passepartout, y Monique, una hermosa navegante. Utilizando una variedad de medios de transporte y las habilidades marciales de Passepartout, el trío se embarca en una aventura en globo alrededor del mundo.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: La primera misión del agente británico James Bond como agente 007 lo lleva hasta Le Chiffre, banquero de los terroristas de todo el mundo. Para detenerlo, Bond debe primero derrotarlo en una arriesgada partida de póquer en el Casino Royale.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: La búsqueda de James Bond de los responsables de la muerte de Vesper Lynd lo lleva hasta un rudo hombre de negocios que planea controlar un recurso valioso.

programme.title: A la caza de espíritus malignos (2020)
programme.desc: Un agente del tesoro persigue a un contador que trabaja para varias organizaciones criminales. Mientras más cerca de su nuca siente el peso de la justicia, el contador va tomando medidas más drásticas para mantener a salvo su doble vida y su libertad.

programme.title: Adivina quién (2005)
programme.desc: El sarcástico patriarca de una familia negra expresa libremente su opinión del novio blanco de su hija.

programme.title: Mind Jumper (2021)
programme.desc: La habilidad de un joven para teletransportarse a cualquier parte del mundo lo convierte en blanco de personas que desean matarlo y de otros parecidos a él.

programme.title: Terminagolf (1996)
programme.desc: Un jugador de hockey triunfa al utilizar su famoso movimiento y su temperamento en los campos profesionales de golf.

programme.title: Asalto al poder (2013)
programme.desc: El policía del Capitolio John Cale debe pasar una entrevista para entrar en el Servicio Secreto. Sin saber el resultado, lleva a su hija a visitar la Casa Blanca, pero, durante el recorrido, un grupo paramilitar asalta el edificio.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: La primera misión del agente británico James Bond como agente 007 lo lleva hasta Le Chiffre, banquero de los terroristas de todo el mundo. Para detenerlo, Bond debe primero derrotarlo en una arriesgada partida de póquer en el Casino Royale.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: La búsqueda de James Bond de los responsables de la muerte de Vesper Lynd lo lleva hasta un rudo hombre de negocios que planea controlar un recurso valioso.

programme.title: Skyfall (2012)
programme.desc: La identidad de los agentes encubiertos de todo el mundo ha quedado expuesta y el MI6 está siendo atacado. En el peor momento que ha vivido el servicio de inteligencia británico, M acude al único hombre en quien puede confiar: James Bond.
